Useful for initializing after DOM modifications.\n85\t         * @param {string} selector - CSS selector for panel elements (default: all panel classes)\n86\t         */\n87\t        applyToAllPanels:      * @returns {boolean} True if blockers are present\n100\t         */\n101\t        hasTouchBlocker: function(element) {\n102\t            if (!element) return false;\n103\t            // Check if * Spaxel Dashboard - Touch Controls for Panel Touch Event Handling\n *\n * Utility for preventing touch events on sidebar panels from propagating\n * to the Three.js canvas and triggering unintended OrbitControls actions.\n *\n * All listeners use passive: true with stopPropagation() to prevent\n * iOS Safari warnings about passive event listeners while still\n * preventing event bubbling to the canvas.\n *\n * OrbitControls Configuration (app.js):\n * - ONE: THREE.TOUCH.ROTATE (one-finger orbit)\n * - TWO: THREE.TOUCH.DOLLY (pinch zoom ONLY, no pan)\n * - THREE: THREE.TOUCH.PAN (three-finger pan)\n * - zoomSpeed: 1.0 (standard touch zoom speed)\n * - Canvas touch-action: none (prevents passive listener warnings)\n *\n * Usage:\n *   Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker(sidebarElement);\n *   Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker(overlayElement);\n *\n * The module also provides direct access to individual event handlers\n * for custom use cases.\n */\n\n(function(window) {\n    'use strict';\n\n    var Controls = {\n        /**\n         * Add touch event stopPropagation listeners to a panel element.\n         * Prevents touchstart/touchmove/touchend from bubbling to the canvas.\n         * @param {HTMLElement} element - A sidebar, overlay, or modal element\n         */\n        addPanelTouchBlocker: function(element) {\n            if (!element) return;\n\n            // Use passive listeners with stopPropagation to avoid iOS warnings\n            // touchstart: Prevents initial touch from reaching canvas\n            element.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n\n            // touchmove: Prevents scrolling/dragging from reaching canvas\n            element.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n\n            // touchend: Prevents tap release from reaching canvas\n            element.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n\n            // touchcancel: Handle system-interrupted touches\n            element.addEventListener('touchcancel', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Remove touch event blockers from an element.\n         * Useful for dynamic panels that are reused.\n         * @param {HTMLElement} element - The element to remove blockers from\n         */\n        removePanelTouchBlocker: (function() {\n            // Store references to handlers to enable removal\n            var handlers = new WeakMap();\n\n            return function(element) {\n                if (!element) return;\n\n                var elementHandlers = handlers.get(element);\n                if (elementHandlers) {\n                    elementHandlers.forEach(function(handler) {\n                        element.removeEventListener(handler.type, handler.fn, handler.options);\n                    });\n                    handlers.delete(element);\n                }\n            };\n        })(),\n\n        /**\n         * Apply touch blocking to all panel elements in the DOM.\n         * Useful for initializing after DOM modifications.\n         * @param {string} selector - CSS selector for panel elements (default: all panel classes)\n         */\n        applyToAllPanels: function(selector) {\n            selector = selector || '.panel-sidebar, .panel-overlay, .panel-modal, .modal-container, .modal-backdrop';\n            var panels = document.querySelectorAll(selector);\n            panels.forEach(function(panel) {\n                Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker(panel);\n            });\n            return panels.length;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Check if an element has touch event blockers applied.\n         * @param {HTMLElement} element - The element to check\n         * @returns {boolean} True if blockers are present\n         */\n        hasTouchBlocker: function(element) {\n            if (!element) return false;\n            // Check if element has the data attribute we'll add\n            return element.hasAttribute('data-touch-blocker');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // Add data attribute when blocker is applied (for debugging/inspection)\n    var originalAdd = Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker;\n    Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker = function(element) {\n        if (!element) return;\n        originalAdd.call(this, element);\n        element.setAttribute('data-touch-blocker', 'true');\n    };\n\n    // Auto-apply to existing panels on load (with slight delay for DOM readiness)\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n            setTimeout(function() {\n                Controls.applyToAllPanels();\n                console.log('[Controls] Touch blockers applied to ' + Controls.applyToAllPanels() + ' existing panels');\n            }, 100);\n        });\n    } else {\n        // DOM already ready\n        setTimeout(function() {\n            var count = Controls.applyToAllPanels();\n            console.log('[Controls] Touch blockers applied to ' + count + ' existing panels');\n        }, 100);\n    }\n\n    // Export to window\n    window.Controls = Controls;\n\n    // Also export to Spaxel namespace for consistency with other modules\n    if (!window.Spaxel) {\n        window.Spaxel = {};\n    }\n    window.Spaxel.Controls = Controls;\n\n    console.log('[Controls] Touch controls module initialized');\n})(window);\n","numLines":143,"startLine":1,"totalLines":143}}}

*/\n98\t    function isMobile() {\n99\t        return window.innerWidth < 1024;\n100\t    }\n101\t\n102\t    /**\n103\t     * Get the pixel ratio capped at 2.0 for mobile devices.\n104\t     * This }\n114\t\n115\t    function initScene() {\n116\t        const container = document.getElementById('scene-container');\n117\t\n118\t        // Scene\n119\t        scene = new THREE.Scene();\n120\t {\n318\t        // Use visualViewport API on iOS Safari (handles address bar, bottom nav)\n319\t        if (window.visualViewport && window.visualViewport.width > 0) {\n320\t            return {\n321\t                width: window.visualViewport.width,\n322\t                height: window.visualViewport.height\n323\t            };\n324\t        }\n325\t        // Fallback to standard window resize events with iOS Safari visual viewport support.\n334\t     * Updates renderer size, camera aspect ratio, and projection matrix.\n335\t     */\n336\t    function onWindowResize() {\n337\t width / height;\n343\t        camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n344\t\n345\t        // Update renderer size\n346\t        renderer.setSize(width, height);\n347\t\n348\t        // Update pixel ratio in case it changed (e.g., moving between displays)\n349\t        // Use capped pixel ratio for mobile devices\n350\t        renderer.setPixelRatio(getPixelRatio());\n351\t\n352\t        // Update FXAA resolution if active\n353\t        if (window.SpaxelFXAA && window.SpaxelFXAA.isActive()) {\n354\t            window.SpaxelFXAA.updateResolution();\n355\t        }\n356\t    }\n357\t\n358\t    /**\n359\t     * Handle orientation change events.\n360\t     * Debounced to avoid multiple rapid calls during orientation transition.\n361\t     */\n362\t    var orientationChangeTimeout = null;\n363\t\n364\t    function onOrientationChange() {\n365\t        // Clear any pending resize\n366\t        if (orientationChangeTimeout) {\n367\t            clearTimeout(orientationChangeTimeout);\n368\t        }\n369\t\n370\t        // Debounce resize to allow browser to complete orientation transition\n371\t        // iOS Safari visual viewport may take a moment to stabilize\n372\t        orientationChangeTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n373\t            // Force a full resize after orientation change completes\n374\t            onWindowResize();\n375\t\n376\t            // Additional visual viewport check for iOS Safari\n377\t            if (window.visualViewport) {\n378\t                // iOS Safari: wait for visual viewport to stabilize\n379\t                // The resize event will fire again once it does\n380\t                window.visualViewport.addEventListener('resize', function onViewportResize() {\n381\t                    onWindowResize();\n382\t                    // Remove listener after first callback\n383\t                    window.visualViewport.removeEventListener('resize', onViewportResize);\n384\t                }, { once: true });\n385\t            }\n386\t        }, 100);\n387\t    }\n388\t\n389\t    function animate() {\n390\t        requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n391\t\n392\t        const now = performance.now();\n393\t        const elapsed = now - state.lastFrameTime;\n394\t\n395\t        // Frame rate capping: skip this frame if not enough time has elapsed\n396\t        if (elapsed < state.minFrameTime) {\n397\t            return; // Skip this frame to maintain target FPS\n398\t        }\n399\t\n400\t        state.lastFrameTime = now;\n401\t\n402\t        controls.update();\n403\t        Viz3D.update();\n404\t        if (window.Placement) Placement.update();\n405\t        // Use FXAA post-processing on mobile, direct rendering on desktop\n406\t        if (window.SpaxelFXAA && window.SpaxelFXAA.isActive()) {\n407\t            window.SpaxelFXAA.render();\n408\t        } else {\n409\t            renderer.render(scene, camera);\n410\t        }\n411\t        updateFPS();\n412\t        detectStrugglingDevice();\n413\t    }\n414\t\n415\t    /**\n416\t     * Detect struggling devices by monitoring FPS history.\n417\t     * If consistently below threshold FPS on mobile, cap at 30 FPS.\n418\t     * This helps devices that can't maintain 60 FPS by reducing rendering load.\n419\t     */\n420\t    function detectStrugglingDevice() {\n421\t        if (!isMobile() || !CONFIG.autoDetectStrugglingDevice) return;\n422\t\n423\t        // Calculate current FPS based on actual frame rendering time\n424\t        // Use the elapsed time since last frame was RENDERED (after frame skipping)\n425\t        const now = performance.now();\n426\t        const elapsed = now - state.lastFrameTime;\n427\t        const currentFPS = elapsed > 0 ? Math.round(1000 / elapsed) : 60;\n428\t\n429\t        // Maintain FPS history (last 60 samples for more stable detection)\n430\t        state.fpsHistory.push(currentFPS);\n431\t        if (state.fpsHistory.length > 60) {\n432\t            state.fpsHistory.shift();\n433\t        }\n434\t\n435\t        // Only check average FPS after collecting enough samples (1 second at 60fps)\n436\t        if (state.fpsHistory.length >= 60) {\n437\t            const avgFPS = state.fpsHistory.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / state.fpsHistory.length;\n438\t            const minFPS = Math.min(...state.fpsHistory);\n439\t            const maxFPS = Math.max(...state.fpsHistory);\n440\t\n441\t            // Check if device is struggling:\n442\t            // 1. Average FPS is below threshold AND\n443\t            // 2. FPS is consistently low (min and max are both low) AND\n444\t            // 3. We're not already in struggling mode\n445\t            const strugglingThreshold = CONFIG.strugglingDeviceThreshold || 25;\n446\t            const recoveryThreshold = CONFIG.strugglingDeviceRecoveryThreshold || 40;\n447\t\n448\t            if (avgFPS < strugglingThreshold && maxFPS < strugglingThreshold + 10 && !state.strugglingDevice) {\n449\t                // Device is struggling - enable performance mode\n450\t                console.log('[Spaxel] Struggling device detected (avg FPS: ' + avgFPS.toFixed(1) + ', min: ' + minFPS + '), capping at 30 FPS');\n451\t                state.strugglingDevice = true;\n452\t                state.targetFPS = CONFIG.mobileFrameRateCap || 30;\n453\t                state.minFrameTime = 1000 / state.targetFPS;\n454\t\n455\t                // Show a toast notification to inform the user\n456\t                showToast('Performance mode enabled (30 FPS)', 'info');\n457\t\n458\t                // Disable expensive visual effects on struggling devices\n459\t                disableExpensiveEffects();\n460\t            }\n461\t            // Recover if FPS improves consistently\n462\t            else if (avgFPS > recoveryThreshold && minFPS > recoveryThreshold - 5 && state.strugglingDevice) {\n463\t                console.log('[Spaxel] Performance improved (avg FPS: ' + avgFPS.toFixed(1) + '), restoring 60 FPS');\n464\t                state.strugglingDevice = false;\n465\t                state.targetFPS = state.manualFrameRateCap || 60;\n466\t                state.minFrameTime = 1000 / state.targetFPS;\n467\t\n468\t                // Re-enable effects that were disabled\n469\t                enableExpensiveEffects();\n470\t            }\n471\t        }\n472\t    }\n473\t\n474\t    /**\n475\t     * Disable expensive visual effects to improve performance on struggling devices.\n476\t     */\n477\t    function disableExpensiveEffects() {\n478\t        // Reduce trail length\n479\t        if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.setTrailLength) {\n480\t            window.Viz3D.setTrailLength(20); // Reduce from default\n481\t        }\n482\t\n483\t        // Disable Fresnel zone debug overlay if active\n484\t        if (state.fresnelDebugVisible) {\n485\t            toggleFresnelDebugOverlay(false);\n486\t        }\n487\t\n488\t        // Disable crowd flow visualization\n489\t        if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.setFlowLayerVisible) {\n490\t            window.Viz3D.setFlowLayerVisible(false);\n491\t        }\n492\t\n493\t        console.log('[Spaxel] Disabled expensive effects for performance');\n494\t    }\n495\t\n496\t    /**\n497\t     * Re-enable visual effects when performance recovers.\n498\t     */\n499\t    function enableExpensiveEffects() {\n500\t        // Restore trail length\n501\t        if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.setTrailLength) {\n502\t            window.Viz3D.setTrailLength(60); // Restore default\n503\t        }\n504\t\n505\t        console.log('[Spaxel] Re-enabled visual effects');\n506\t    }\n507\t\n508\t    // ============================================\n509\t    // System Quality Gauge\n510\t    // ============================================\n511\t    function updateQualityGauge(score, linkCount, worstLinkID, worstScore) {\n512\t        const valueEl = document.getElementById('quality-value');\n513\t        const fillEl = document.getElementById('quality-gauge-fill');\n514\t        const linkCountEl = document.getElementById('quality-link-count');\n515\t        const worstLinkEl = document.getElementById('quality-worst-link');\n516\t        const worstScoreEl = document.getElementById('quality-worst-score');\n517\t\n518\t        if (!valueEl || !fillEl) return;\n519\t\n520\t        // Update percentage display\n521\t        const pct = Math.round(score * 100);\n522\t        valueEl.textContent = pct + '%';\n523\t\n524\t        // Update circular gauge (stroke-dasharray: circumference = 2 * PI * r = ~81.7 for r=13)\n525\t        const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * 13;\n526\t        const dashLength = (score * circumference).toFixed(1);\n527\t        fillEl.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', dashLength + ' ' + circumference);\n528\t\n529\t        // Update color based on score\n530\t        let color;\n531\t        if (score >= 0.7) {\n532\t            color = '#66bb6a'; // green\n533\t        } else if (score >= 0.4) {\n534\t            color = '#eab308'; // yellow\n535\t        } else {\n536\t            color = '#ef4444'; // red\n537\t        }\n538\t        fillEl.setAttribute('stroke', color);\n539\t\n540\t        // Update tooltip\n541\t        if (linkCountEl) linkCountEl.textContent = linkCount;\n542\t        if (worstLinkEl) worstLinkEl.textContent = worstLinkID ? abbreviateLinkID(worstLinkID) : '--';\n543\t        if (worstScoreEl) worstScoreEl.textContent = worstScore !== null ? Math.round(worstScore * 100) + '%' : '--';\n544\t    }\n545\t\n546\t    function startHealthPolling() {\n547\t        if (state.healthPollTimer) {\n548\t            clearInterval(state.healthPollTimer);\n549\t        }\n550\t\n551\t        fetchLinkHealth();\n552\t\n553\t        state.healthPollTimer = setInterval(fetchLinkHealth, CONFIG.healthPollIntervalMs);\n554\t    }\n555\t\n556\t    function fetchLinkHealth() {\n557\t        fetch('/api/links')\n558\t            .then(function(res) { return res.json(); })\n559\t            .then(function(links) {\n560\t                handleLinkHealthUpdate(links);\n561\t            })\n562\t            .catch(function(err) {\n563\t                console.error('[Spaxel] Failed to fetch link health:', err);\n564\t            });\n565\t    }\n566\t\n567\t    function handleLinkHealthUpdate(links) {\n568\t        if (!links || links.length === 0) {\n569\t            state.systemHealth = 0;\n570\t            state.worstLinkID = null;\n571\t            state.worstLinkScore = 1.0;\n572\t            updateQualityGauge(0, 0, null, null);\n573\t            return;\n574\t        }\n575\t\n576\t        // Calculate system health (weighted average of all links)\n577\t        var totalScore = 0;\n578\t        var worstScore = 1.0;\n579\t        var worstID = null;\n580\t\n581\t        // Prepare link data for proactive quality monitoring\n582\t        var linksForProactive = links.map(function(link) {\n583\t            return {\n584\t                link_id: link.link_id,\n585\t                composite_score: link.health_score,\n586\t                quality: link.health_score,\n587\t                health_score: link.health_score,\n588\t                health_details: link.health_details\n589\t            };\n590\t        });\n591\t\n592\t        links.forEach(function(link) {\n593\t            var score = link.health_score !== undefined ? link.health_score : 0.5;\n594\t            totalScore += score;\n595\t\n596\t            if (score < worstScore) {\n597\t                worstScore = score;\n598\t                worstID = link.link_id;\n599\t            }\n600\t        });\n601\t\n602\t        state.systemHealth = totalScore / links.length;\n603\t        state.worstLinkID = worstID;\n604\t        state.worstLinkScore = worstScore;\n605\t\n606\t        updateQualityGauge(state.systemHealth, links.length, worstID, worstScore);\n607\t\n608\t        // Dispatch spaxel:update event for proactive quality monitoring\n609\t        window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('spaxel:update', {\n610\t            detail: { links: linksForProactive }\n611\t        }));\n612\t\n613\t        // Also update 3D visualization\n614\t        if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.updateLinkHealth) {\n615\t            Viz3D.updateLinkHealth(links);\n616\t        }\n617\t\n618\t        // Also update LinkHealth panel\n619\t        if (window.LinkHealth && window.LinkHealth.updateLinkHealth) {\n620\t            LinkHealth.updateLinkHealth(links);\n621\t        }\n622\t    }\n623\t\n624\t    // ============================================\n625\t    // Diurnal Learning Status\n626\t    // ============================================\n627\t    function startDiurnalPolling() {\n628\t        if (state.diurnalPollTimer) {\n629\t            clearInterval(state.diurnalPollTimer);\n630\t        }\n631\t\n632\t        fetchDiurnalStatus();\n633\t\n634\t        state.diurnalPollTimer = setInterval(fetchDiurnalStatus, CONFIG.diurnalPollIntervalMs);\n635\t    }\n636\t\n637\t    function fetchDiurnalStatus() {\n638\t        fetch('/api/diurnal/status')\n639\t            .then(function(res) { return res.json(); })\n640\t            .then(function(statuses) {\n641\t                handleDiurnalStatusUpdate(statuses);\n642\t            })\n643\t            .catch(function(err) {\n644\t                console.error('[Spaxel] Failed to fetch diurnal status:', err);\n645\t            });\n646\t    }\n647\t\n648\t    function handleDiurnalStatusUpdate(statuses) {\n649\t        if (!statuses || statuses.length === 0) {\n650\t            updateDiurnalBanner(null);\n651\t            return;\n652\t        }\n653\t\n654\t        // Find the link with the longest remaining learning time\n655\t        var worstStatus = null;\n656\t        statuses.forEach(function(status) {\n657\t            state.diurnalStatus.set(status.link_id, status);\n658\t            if (!worstStatus || status.days_remaining > worstStatus.days_remaining) {\n659\t                if (status.is_learning) {\n660\t                    worstStatus = status;\n661\t                }\n662\t            }\n663\t        });\n664\t\n665\t        updateDiurnalBanner(worstStatus);\n666\t    }\n667\t\n668\t    function updateDiurnalBanner(status) {\n669\t        var banner = document.getElementById('diurnal-banner');\n670\t        var message = document.getElementById('diurnal-message');\n671\t        var progress = document.getElementById('diurnal-progress');\n672\t        var daysLeft = document.getElementById('diurnal-days-left');\n673\t\n674\t        if (!banner) return;\n675\t\n676\t        if (!status || !status.is_learning) {\n677\t            banner.classList.remove('visible');\n678\t            return;\n679\t        }\n680\t\n681\t        banner.classList.add('visible');\n682\t\n683\t        if (message) {\n684\t            message.textContent = 'Learning your home\\'s daily patterns...';\n685\t        }\n686\t\n687\t        if (progress) {\n688\t            var pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, status.progress || 0));\n689\t            progress.style.width = pct + '%';\n690\t        }\n691\t\n692\t        if (daysLeft) {\n693\t            var days = Math.ceil(status.days_remaining || 0);\n694\t            if (days > 0) {\n695\t                daysLeft.textContent = days + (days === 1 ? ' day left' : ' days left');\n696\t            } else {\n697\t                daysLeft.textContent = 'Almost ready...';\n698\t            }\n699\t        }\n700\t    }\n701\t\n702\t    function showToast(message, type) {\n703\t        var container = document.getElementById('toast-container');\n704\t        if (!container) return;\n705\t\n706\t        var toast = document.createElement('div');\n707\t        toast.className = 'toast toast-' + (type || 'info');\n708\t        toast.textContent = message;\n709\t\n710\t        container.appendChild(toast);\n711\t\n712\t        setTimeout(function() {\n713\t            toast.classList.add('fade-out');\n714\t            setTimeout(function() {\n715\t                if (toast.parentNode) {\n716\t                    toast.parentNode.removeChild(toast);\n717\t                }\n718\t            }, 300);\n719\t        }, 5000);\n720\t    }\n721\t\n722\t    function updateFPS() {\n723\t        state.frameCount++;\n724\t        const now = performance.now();\n725\t        const elapsed = now - state.lastFpsTime;\n726\t        if (elapsed >= 1000) {\n727\t            const fps = Math.round(state.frameCount * 1000 / elapsed);\n728\t            document.getElementById('fps-counter').textContent = fps;\n729\t            state.frameCount = 0;\n730\t            state.lastFpsTime = now;\n731\t        }\n732\t    }\n733\t\n734\t    // ============================================\n735\t    // WebSocket Connection (via SpaxelWebSocket)\n736\t    // ============================================\n737\t    function connectWebSocket() {\n738\t        // Initialize the WebSocket manager with callbacks\n739\t        SpaxelWebSocket.init({\n740\t            onOpen: function(ws) {\n741\t                console.log('[Spaxel] WebSocket connected');\n742\t                state.wsConnected = true;\n743\t                state.awaitingSnapshot = true;\n744\t            },\n745\t            onMessage: function(data) {\n746\t                handleMessage(data);\n747\t            },\n748\t            onClose: function(event) {\n749\t                console.log('[Spaxel] WebSocket closed:', event.code, event.reason);\n750\t                state.wsConnected = false;\n751\t\n752\t                // Start blob extrapolation using captured blob states\n753\t                SpaxelWebSocket.startExtrapolation();\n754\t            },\n755\t            onError: function(error) {\n756\t                console.error('[Spaxel] WebSocket error:', error);\n757\t            }\n758\t        });\n759\t\n760\t        SpaxelWebSocket.connect();\n761\t    }\n762\t\n763\t    // ============================================\n764\t    // Message Handling\n765\t    // ============================================\n766\t\n767\t    // Event handlers for new message types\n768\t\n769\t    function handleEventMessage(msg) {\n770\t        if (!msg.event) return;\n771\t\n772\t        const event = msg.event;\n773\t\n774\t        // Dedup: skip if we already processed this event (from immediate broadcast or prior delta)\n775\t        const eid = String(event.id);\n776\t        if (state.recentEventIDs.has(eid)) return;\n777\t        state.recentEventIDs.add(eid);\n778\t\n779\t        // Prune old IDs every 30 seconds to prevent unbounded growth\n780\t        const now = Date.now();\n781\t        if (now > state.recentEventIDsPruneAt) {\n782\t            state.recentEventIDs.clear();\n783\t            state.recentEventIDsPruneAt = now + 30000;\n784\t        }\n785\t\n786\t        console.log('[Spaxel] Event:', event.kind, 'in', event.zone, 'by', event.person_name || 'blob #' + event.blob_id);\n787\t\n788\t        // Log to timeline\n789\t        const timeStr = new Date(event.ts).toLocaleTimeString();\n790\t        let description = '';\n791\t\n792\t        if (event.kind === 'zone_entry') {\n793\t            description = (event.person_name || 'Someone') + ' entered ' + event.zone;\n794\t        } else if (event.kind === 'zone_exit') {\n795\t            description = (event.person_name || 'Someone') + ' left ' + event.zone;\n796\t        } else if (event.kind === 'portal_crossing') {\n797\t            description = (event.person_name || 'Someone') + ' crossed portal in ' + event.zone;\n798\t        } else if (event.kind === 'presence_transition') {\n799\t            description = (event.person_name || 'Someone') + ' presence detected in ' + event.zone;\n800\t        } else {\n801\t            description = event.kind + ' in ' + event.zone;\n802\t        }\n803\t\n804\t        logTimelineEvent(event.kind, null, description + ' (' + timeStr + ')');\n805\t\n806\t        // Show toast for security-relevant events\n807\t        if (event.kind === 'zone_entry' || event.kind === 'portal_crossing') {\n808\t            showToast(description, 'info');\n809\t        }\n810\t    }\n811\t\n812\t    function handleAlertMessage(msg) {\n813\t        if (!msg.alert) return;\n814\t\n815\t        const alert = msg.alert;\n816\t        console.log('[Spaxel] Alert:', alert.severity, alert.description);\n817\t\n818\t        // Show toast notification\n819\t        const toastType = alert.severity === 'critical' ? 'error' : 'warning';\n820\t        showToast(alert.description, toastType);\n821\t\n822\t        // Log to timeline\n823\t        const timeStr = new Date(alert.ts).toLocaleTimeString();\n824\t        logTimelineEvent('alert', null, '[' + alert.severity.toUpperCase() + '] ' + alert.description + ' (' + timeStr + ')');\n825\t\n826\t        // Could trigger UI alert state here (e.g., show alert banner)\n827\t        if (window.showAlertBanner) {\n828\t            window.showAlertBanner(alert);\n829\t        }\n830\t    }\n831\t\n832\t    function handleBLEScanMessage(msg) {\n833\t        if (!msg.devices || !Array.isArray(msg.devices)) return;\n834\t\n835\t        console.log('[Spaxel] BLE scan: ' + msg.devices.length + ' devices');\n836\t\n837\t        // Update BLE device list state\n838\t        if (!state.bleDevices) {\n839\t            state.bleDevices = new Map();\n840\t        }\n841\t\n842\t        // Clear previous entries and add current devices\n843\t        state.bleDevices.clear();\n844\t        msg.devices.forEach(function (device) {\n845\t            state.bleDevices.set(device.mac || device.addr, {\n846\t                mac: device.mac || device.addr,\n847\t                name: device.name || device.device_name || 'Unknown',\n848\t                rssi: device.rssi || device.rssi_dbm || 0,\n849\t                last_seen: device.last_seen || Date.now(),\n850\t                label: device.label || '',\n851\t                blob_id: device.blob_id || null\n852\t            });\n853\t        });\n854\t\n855\t        // Update UI if BLE panel exists\n856\t        if (window.BLEPanel && window.BLEPanel.updateDevices) {\n857\t            window.BLEPanel.updateDevices(msg.devices);\n858\t        }\n859\t    }\n860\t\n861\t    function handleTriggerStateMessage(msg) {\n862\t        if (!msg.trigger) return;\n863\t\n864\t        const trigger = msg.trigger;\n865\t        console.log('[Spaxel] Trigger state:', trigger.name, 'enabled=' + trigger.enabled);\n866\t\n867\t        // Update trigger state in UI if automation panel exists\n868\t        if (window.Automations && window.Automations.updateTriggerState) {\n869\t            window.Automations.updateTriggerState(trigger);\n870\t        }\n871\t    }\n872\t\n873\t    function handleSystemHealthMessage(msg) {\n874\t        if (!msg.health) return;\n875\t\n876\t        const health = msg.health;\n877\t\n878\t        // Update system health display in UI\n879\t        const healthEl = document.getElementById('system-uptime');\n880\t        if (healthEl) {\n881\t            const uptimeSec = health.uptime_s || 0;\n882\t            const days = Math.floor(uptimeSec / 86400);\n883\t            const hours = Math.floor((uptimeSec % 86400) / 3600);\n884\t            const mins = Math.floor((uptimeSec % 3600) / 60);\n885\t            if (days > 0) {\n886\t                healthEl.textContent = days + 'd ' + hours + 'h ' + mins + 'm';\n887\t            } else {\n888\t                healthEl.textContent = hours + 'h ' + mins + 'm';\n889\t            }\n890\t        }\n891\t\n892\t        const memEl = document.getElementById('system-memory');\n893\t        if (memEl) {\n894\t            memEl.textContent = (health.mem_mb || 0).toFixed(1) + ' MB';\n895\t        }\n896\t\n897\t        const goroutinesEl = document.getElementById('system-goroutines');\n898\t        if (goroutinesEl) {\n899\t            goroutinesEl.textContent = health.go_routines || 0;\n900\t        }\n901\t    }\n902\t\n903\t    function handleMessage(data) {\n904\t        if (typeof data === 'string') {\n905\t            // JSON message\n906\t            try {\n907\t                const msg = JSON.parse(data);\n908\t                handleJSONMessage(msg);\n909\t            } catch (e) {\n910\t                console.error('[Spaxel] Failed to parse JSON:', e);\n911\t            }\n912\t        } else if (data instanceof ArrayBuffer) {\n913\t            // Binary CSI frame\n914\t            handleBinaryFrame(data);\n915\t        }\n916\t    }\n917\t\n918\t    function handleJSONMessage(msg) {\n919\t        // Snapshot: first message on every connect/reconnect.  Contains full state.\n920\t        if (msg.type === 'snapshot') {\n921\t            handleSnapshot(msg);\n922\t            return;\n923\t        }\n924\t\n925\t        // Incremental update: 10 Hz delta with no type field.\n926\t        // Only fields that changed since last tick are present.\n927\t        if (!msg.type) {\n928\t            handleIncrementalUpdate(msg);\n929\t            return;\n930\t        }\n931\t\n932\t        switch (msg.type) {\n933\t            case 'state':\n934\t                // Initial state dump\n935\t                if (msg.nodes) {\n936\t                    msg.nodes.forEach(node => {\n937\t                        state.nodes.set(node.mac, {\n938\t                            mac: node.mac,\n939\t                            firmware: node.firmware_version,\n940\t                            chip: node.chip,\n941\t                            lastSeen: Date.now()\n942\t                        });\n943\t                    });\n944\t                }\n945\t                if (msg.links) {\n946\t                    msg.links.forEach(link => {\n947\t                        const existing = state.links.get(link.id) || {};\n948\t                        state.links.set(link.id, {\n949\t                            nodeMAC: link.node_mac,\n950\t                            peerMAC: link.peer_mac,\n951\t                            lastFrame: Date.now(),\n952\t                            lastCSI: existing.lastCSI || null,\n953\t                            motionDetected: existing.motionDetected || false,\n954\t                            deltaRMS: existing.deltaRMS || 0,\n955\t                            ampHistory: existing.ampHistory || [],\n956\t                            lastAmpSample: existing.lastAmpSample || 0\n957\t                        });\n958\t                    });\n959\t                }\n960\t                if (msg.motion_states) {\n961\t                    msg.motion_states.forEach(ms => applyMotionState(ms));\n962\t                }\n963\t                updateNodeList();\n964\t                updateLinkList();\n965\t                Viz3D.applyLinks(msg.links || []);\n966\t                break;\n967\t\n968\t            case 'node_connected':\n969\t                state.nodes.set(msg.mac, {\n970\t                    mac: msg.mac,\n971\t                    firmware: msg.firmware_version,\n972\t                    chip: msg.chip,\n973\t                    unpaired: !!msg.unpaired,\n974\t                    lastSeen: Date.now()\n975\t                });\n976\t                updateNodeList();\n977\t                if (window.SpaxelTroubleshoot) {\n978\t                    window.SpaxelTroubleshoot.handleEvent('node_connected', msg);\n979\t                }\n980\t                // Show first-time tooltips on first node connection\n981\t                if (window.SpaxelTooltips && state.nodes.size === 1) {\n982\t                    setTimeout(function () { window.SpaxelTooltips.showSequence(); }, 2000);\n983\t                }\n984\t                break;\n985\t\n986\t            case 'node_disconnected':\n987\t                state.nodes.delete(msg.mac);\n988\t                updateNodeList();\n989\t                if (window.SpaxelTroubleshoot) {\n990\t                    window.SpaxelTroubleshoot.handleEvent('node_disconnected', msg);\n991\t                }\n992\t                break;\n993\t\n994\t            case 'link_active':\n995\t                if (!state.links.has(msg.id)) {\n996\t                    state.links.set(msg.id, {\n997\t                        nodeMAC: msg.node_mac,\n998\t                        peerMAC: msg.peer_mac,\n999\t                        lastFrame: Date.now(),\n1000\t                        lastCSI: null,\n1001\t                        motionDetected: false,\n1002\t                        deltaRMS: 0,\n1003\t                        ampHistory: [],\n1004\t                        lastAmpSample: 0\n1005\t                    });\n1006\t                    updateLinkList();\n1007\t                }\n1008\t                Viz3D.handleLinkActive(msg);\n1009\t                break;\n1010\t\n1011\t            case 'link_inactive':\n1012\t                state.links.delete(msg.id);\n1013\t                updateLinkList();\n1014\t                Viz3D.handleLinkInactive(msg);\n1015\t                break;\n1016\t\n1017\t            case 'motion_state':\n1018\t                // Targeted broadcast on state change\n1019\t                if (msg.links) {\n1020\t                    let changed = false;\n1021\t                    msg.links.forEach(ms => {\n1022\t                        if (applyMotionState(ms)) changed = true;\n1023\t                    });\n1024\t                    if (changed) updateLinkList();\n1025\t                }\n1026\t                break;\n1027\t\n1028\t            case 'presence_update':\n1029\t                handlePresenceUpdate(msg);\n1030\t                break;\n1031\t\n1032\t            case 'registry_state':\n1033\t                Viz3D.handleRegistryState(msg);\n1034\t                if (window.Placement) Placement.handleRegistryState(msg);\n1035\t                // Merge virtual nodes into local state and refresh node list\n1036\t                if (msg.nodes) {\n1037\t                    var registryMACs = new Set(msg.nodes.map(function (n) { return n.mac; }));\n1038\t                    msg.nodes.forEach(function (node) {\n1039\t                        if (!state.nodes.has(node.mac)) {\n1040\t                            state.nodes.set(node.mac, {\n1041\t                                mac: node.mac,\n1042\t                                firmware: '',\n1043\t                                chip: '',\n1044\t                                lastSeen: 0,\n1045\t                                virtual: !!node.virtual\n1046\t                            });\n1047\t                        } else {\n1048\t                            var existing = state.nodes.get(node.mac);\n1049\t                            if (node.virtual) existing.virtual = true;\n1050\t                        }\n1051\t                    });\n1052\t                    // Remove virtual nodes no longer in registry\n1053\t                    state.nodes.forEach(function (node, mac) {\n1054\t                        if (!registryMACs.has(mac) && node.virtual) {\n1055\t                            state.nodes.delete(mac);\n1056\t                        }\n1057\t                    });\n1058\t                    updateNodeList();\n1059\t                }\n1060\t                break;\n1061\t\n1062\t            case 'loc_update':\n1063\t                Viz3D.handleLocUpdate(msg);\n1064\t                break;\n1065\t\n1066\t            case 'link_health':\n1067\t                // Health score update from server\n1068\t                if (msg.links) {\n1069\t                    handleLinkHealthUpdate(msg.links);\n1070\t                }\n1071\t                break;\n1072\t\n1073\t            case 'diurnal_ready':\n1074\t                // Diurnal patterns learned notification\n1075\t                showToast(msg.message || 'Daily patterns learned! Detection accuracy improved.', 'success');\n1076\t                // Refresh diurnal status\n1077\t                fetchDiurnalStatus();\n1078\t                break;\n1079\t\n1080\t            case 'event':\n1081\t                // Event: presence transition, zone entry/exit, portal crossing\n1082\t                handleEventMessage(msg);\n1083\t                break;\n1084\t\n1085\t            case 'alert':\n1086\t                // Alert: anomaly detection, security mode trigger\n1087\t                handleAlertMessage(msg);\n1088\t                break;\n1089\t\n1090\t            case 'ble_scan':\n1091\t                // BLE device list update (5s interval)\n1092\t                handleBLEScanMessage(msg);\n1093\t                break;\n1094\t\n1095\t            case 'trigger_state':\n1096\t                // Automation trigger state change\n1097\t                handleTriggerStateMessage(msg);\n1098\t                break;\n1099\t\n1100\t            case 'system_health':\n1101\t                // System health stats (60s interval)\n1102\t                handleSystemHealthMessage(msg);\n1103\t                break;\n1104\t\n1105\t            case 'morning_summary':\n1106\t                // Sleep morning summary (shown once after wake time)\n1107\t                if (window.SpaxelSleep && window.SpaxelSleep.handleMorningSummary) {\n1108\t                    window.SpaxelSleep.handleMorningSummary(msg);\n1109\t                }\n1110\t                break;\n1111\t\n1112\t            case 'morning_briefing':\n1113\t                // Full morning briefing with sleep, overnight events, system health, predictions\n1114\t                if (window.SpaxelBriefing && window.SpaxelBriefing.showBriefing) {\n1115\t                    window.SpaxelBriefing.showBriefing(msg.briefing);\n1116\t                }\n1117\t                break;\n1118\t\n1119\t            case 'sleep_status':\n1120\t                // Live sleep session status updates\n1121\t                if (window.SpaxelSleep && window.SpaxelSleep.handleSleepStatus) {\n1122\t                    window.SpaxelSleep.handleSleepStatus(msg);\n1123\t                }\n1124\t                break;\n1125\t\n1126\t            case 'quality_drop':\n1127\t                // Guided troubleshooting: zone quality degraded\n1128\t                if (window.SpaxelTroubleshoot) {\n1129\t                    window.SpaxelTroubleshoot.handleEvent('quality_drop', msg);\n1130\t                }\n1131\t                break;\n1132\t\n1133\t            case 'repeated_edit':\n1134\t                // Guided troubleshooting: settings adjusted repeatedly\n1135\t                if (window.SpaxelTroubleshoot) {\n1136\t                    window.SpaxelTroubleshoot.handleEvent('repeated_edit', msg);\n1137\t                }\n1138\t                break;\n1139\t\n1140\t            case 'calibration_complete':\n1141\t                // Guided troubleshooting: baseline calibration complete\n1142\t                if (window.SpaxelTroubleshoot) {\n1143\t                    window.SpaxelTroubleshoot.handleEvent('calibration_complete', msg);\n1144\t                }\n1145\t                break;\n1146\t\n1147\t            case 'node_offline':\n1148\t                // Guided troubleshooting: node offline for >2 hours\n1149\t                if (window.SpaxelTroubleshoot) {\n1150\t                    window.SpaxelTroubleshoot.handleEvent('node_disconnected', msg);\n1151\t                }\n1152\t                break;\n1153\t\n1154\t            case 'replay_update':\n1155\t                // Replay blob updates during time-travel debugging\n1156\t                if (msg.blobs && Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs) {\n1157\t                    Viz3D.updateReplayBlobs(msg.blobs, msg.timestamp_ms);\n1158\t                }\n1159\t                break;\n1160\t\n1161\t            case 'blob_explain':\n1162\t                // Explainability snapshot from the fusion engine\n1163\t                if (window.Explainability && msg.blob_id !== undefined && msg.snapshot) {\n1164\t                    Explainability.handleExplainSnapshot(msg.blob_id, msg.snapshot);\n1165\t                }\n1166\t                break;\n1167\t\n1168\t            case 'zone_change':\n1169\t                // Zone created, updated, or deleted\n1170\t                if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.handleZoneChange) {\n1171\t                    Viz3D.handleZoneChange(msg);\n1172\t                }\n1173\t                break;\n1174\t\n1175\t            case 'portal_change':\n1176\t                // Portal created, updated, or deleted\n1177\t                if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.handlePortalChange) {\n1178\t                    Viz3D.handlePortalChange(msg);\n1179\t                }\n1180\t                break;\n1181\t\n1182\t            case 'zone_occupancy':\n1183\t                // Zone occupancy counts update\n1184\t                if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.handleZoneOccupancy) {\n1185\t                    Viz3D.handleZoneOccupancy(msg);\n1186\t                }\n1187\t                break;\n1188\t\n1189\t            case 'zone_transition':\n1190\t                // Portal crossing event\n1191\t                if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.handleZoneTransition) {\n1192\t                    Viz3D.handleZoneTransition(msg);\n1193\t                }\n1194\t                break;\n1195\t\n1196\t            default:\n1197\t                // Log unhandled types for future debugging\n1198\t                console.log('[Spaxel] Unknown message type:', msg.type, msg);\n1199\t        }\n1200\t    }\n1201\t\n1202\t    // ─── Snapshot + Incremental Update Protocol ─────────────────────────────\n1203\t\n1204\t    function handleSnapshot(msg) {\n1205\t        state.awaitingSnapshot = false;\n1206\t\n1207\t        // On reconnect: clear trails, restore scene, log duration\n1208\t        if (SpaxelWebSocket.isConnected()) {\n1209\t            SpaxelWebSocket.onReconnected();\n1210\t        }\n1211\t\n1212\t        console.log('[Spaxel] Received snapshot, rebuilding state');\n1213\t\n1214\t        // Store snapshot for blob extrapolation on future disconnects\n1215\t        SpaxelWebSocket.setLastSnapshot(msg);\n1216\t\n1217\t        // Nodes\n1218\t        if (msg.nodes) {\n1219\t            state.nodes.clear();\n1220\t            msg.nodes.forEach(function (node) {\n1221\t                state.nodes.set(node.mac, {\n1222\t                    mac: node.mac,\n1223\t                    firmware: node.firmware_version,\n1224\t                    chip: node.chip,\n1225\t                    lastSeen: Date.now()\n1226\t                });\n1227\t            });\n1228\t        }\n1229\t\n1230\t        // Links\n1231\t        if (msg.links) {\n1232\t            state.links.clear();\n1233\t            msg.links.forEach(function (link) {\n1234\t                state.links.set(link.id, {\n1235\t                    nodeMAC: link.node_mac,\n1236\t                    peerMAC: link.peer_mac,\n1237\t                    lastFrame: Date.now(),\n1238\t                    lastCSI: null,\n1239\t                    motionDetected: false,\n1240\t                    deltaRMS: 0,\n1241\t                    ampHistory: [],\n1242\t                    lastAmpSample: 0\n1243\t                });\n1244\t            });\n1245\t        }\n1246\t\n1247\t        // Motion states\n1248\t        if (msg.motion_states) {\n1249\t            msg.motion_states.forEach(function (ms) { applyMotionState(ms); });\n1250\t        }\n1251\t\n1252\t        // Blobs (localisation)\n1253\t        if (msg.blobs) {\n1254\t            Viz3D.handleLocUpdate({ type: 'loc_update', blobs: msg.blobs });\n1255\t        }\n1256\t\n1257\t        // BLE devices\n1258\t        if (msg.ble_devices) {\n1259\t            handleBLEScanMessage({ type: 'ble_scan', devices: msg.ble_devices });\n1260\t        }\n1261\t\n1262\t        // Triggers\n1263\t        if (msg.triggers) {\n1264\t            msg.triggers.forEach(function (trigger) {\n1265\t                if (window.Automations && window.Automations.updateTriggerState) {\n1266\t                    window.Automations.updateTriggerState(trigger);\n1267\t                }\n1268\t            });\n1269\t        }\n1270\t\n1271\t        // Zones\n1272\t        if (msg.zones) {\n1273\t            if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.handleZoneUpdate) {\n1274\t                Viz3D.handleZoneUpdate(msg.zones);\n1275\t            }\n1276\t        }\n1277\t\n1278\t        // Portals\n1279\t        if (msg.portals) {\n1280\t            if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.handlePortalUpdate) {\n1281\t                Viz3D.handlePortalUpdate(msg.portals);\n1282\t            }\n1283\t        }\n1284\t\n1285\t        updateNodeList();\n1286\t        updateLinkList();\n1287\t        Viz3D.applyLinks(msg.links || []);\n1288\t    }\n1289\t\n1290\t    function handleIncrementalUpdate(msg) {\n1291\t        // Drop incremental updates until the snapshot has been received.\n1292\t        if (state.awaitingSnapshot) return;\n1293\t\n1294\t        // Blobs (always present when localisation is running)\n1295\t        if (msg.blobs) {\n1296\t            Viz3D.handleLocUpdate({ type: 'loc_update', blobs: msg.blobs });\n1297\t        }\n1298\t\n1299\t        // Nodes (only present when node list changed)\n1300\t        if (msg.nodes !== undefined) {\n1301\t            if (msg.nodes.length > 0) {\n1302\t                msg.nodes.forEach(function (node) {\n1303\t                    state.nodes.set(node.mac, {\n1304\t                        mac: node.mac,\n1305\t                        firmware: node.firmware_version,\n1306\t                        chip: node.chip,\n1307\t                        lastSeen: Date.now()\n1308\t                    });\n1309\t                });\n1310\t            }\n1311\t            updateNodeList();\n1312\t        }\n1313\t\n1314\t        // Links (only present when link list changed)\n1315\t        if (msg.links !== undefined) {\n1316\t            if (msg.links.length > 0) {\n1317\t                msg.links.forEach(function (link) {\n1318\t                    state.links.set(link.id, {\n1319\t                        nodeMAC: link.node_mac,\n1320\t                        peerMAC: link.peer_mac,\n1321\t                        lastFrame: Date.now(),\n1322\t                        lastCSI: null,\n1323\t                        motionDetected: false,\n1324\t                        deltaRMS: 0,\n1325\t                        ampHistory: [],\n1326\t                        lastAmpSample: 0\n1327\t                    });\n1328\t                });\n1329\t            }\n1330\t            updateLinkList();\n1331\t            Viz3D.applyLinks(msg.links);\n1332\t        }\n1333\t\n1334\t        // Motion states (only present when motion state changed)\n1335\t        if (msg.motion_states) {\n1336\t            var changed = false;\n1337\t            msg.motion_states.forEach(function (ms) {\n1338\t                if (applyMotionState(ms)) changed = true;\n1339\t            });\n1340\t            if (changed) updateLinkList();\n1341\t        }\n1342\t\n1343\t        // BLE devices\n1344\t        if (msg.ble_devices) {\n1345\t            handleBLEScanMessage({ type: 'ble_scan', devices: msg.ble_devices });\n1346\t        }\n1347\t\n1348\t        // Triggers\n1349\t        if (msg.triggers) {\n1350\t            msg.triggers.forEach(function (trigger) {\n1351\t                if (window.Automations && window.Automations.updateTriggerState) {\n1352\t                    window.Automations.updateTriggerState(trigger);\n1353\t                }\n1354\t            });\n1355\t        }\n1356\t\n1357\t        // Zones\n1358\t        if (msg.zones) {\n1359\t            if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.handleZoneUpdate) {\n1360\t                Viz3D.handleZoneUpdate(msg.zones);\n1361\t            }\n1362\t        }\n1363\t\n1364\t        // Portals\n1365\t        if (msg.portals) {\n1366\t            if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.handlePortalUpdate) {\n1367\t                Viz3D.handlePortalUpdate(msg.portals);\n1368\t            }\n1369\t        }\n1370\t\n1371\t        // Events buffered since last tick (presence transitions, zone entries/exits, portal crossings)\n1372\t        if (msg.events && Array.isArray(msg.events)) {\n1373\t            msg.events.forEach(function (evt) {\n1374\t                handleEventMessage({ type: 'event', event: evt });\n1375\t            });\n1376\t        }\n1377\t    }\n1378\t\n1379\t    // applyMotionState updates a link's motion fields; returns true if it changed.\n1380\t    function applyMotionState(ms) {\n1381\t        const link = state.links.get(ms.link_id);\n1382\t        if (!link) return false;\n1383\t        const prev = link.motionDetected;\n1384\t        link.motionDetected = ms.motion_detected;\n1385\t        link.deltaRMS = ms.delta_rms || 0;\n1386\t        // Phase 6: Breathing/dwell state\n1387\t        link.breathingState = ms.breathing_state || 'CLEAR';\n1388\t        link.breathingBPM = ms.breathing_bpm || 0;\n1389\t        return prev !== ms.motion_detected;\n1390\t    }\n1391\t\n1392\t    function handleBinaryFrame(buffer) {\n1393\t        const frame = parseCSIFrame(buffer);\n1394\t        if (!frame) return;\n1395\t\n1396\t        const linkID = frame.linkID;\n1397\t\n1398\t        // Update link state\n1399\t        let link = state.links.get(linkID);\n1400\t        if (!link) {\n1401\t            link = {\n1402\t                nodeMAC: frame.nodeMAC,\n1403\t                peerMAC: frame.peerMAC,\n1404\t                lastFrame: Date.now(),\n1405\t                lastCSI: null,\n1406\t                motionDetected: false,\n1407\t                deltaRMS: 0,\n1408\t                ampHistory: [],\n1409\t                lastAmpSample: 0,\n1410\t                channel: frame.channel\n1411\t            };\n1412\t            state.links.set(linkID, link);\n1413\t            updateLinkList();\n1414\t        } else {\n1415\t            link.lastFrame = Date.now();\n1416\t            link.channel = frame.channel;\n1417\t            // Ensure time-series fields exist on links pre-created from JSON events\n1418\t            if (!link.ampHistory) {\n1419\t                link.ampHistory = [];\n1420\t                link.lastAmpSample = 0;\n1421\t            }\n1422\t        }\n1423\t\n1424\t        // Store CSI for chart rendering\n1425\t        link.lastCSI = frame;\n1426\t\n1427\t        // Push amplitude sample to time series (rate-limited)\n1428\t        const now = performance.now();\n1429\t        if (now - link.lastAmpSample >= CONFIG.tsMinIntervalMs) {\n1430\t            link.lastAmpSample = now;\n1431\t            let sum = 0;\n1432\t            for (let i = 0; i < frame.subcarriers.length; i++) {\n1433\t                sum += frame.subcarriers[i].amplitude;\n1434\t            }\n1435\t            const meanAmp = frame.subcarriers.length > 0 ? sum / frame.subcarriers.length : 0;\n1436\t            link.ampHistory.push({ t: now, amp: meanAmp, motion: link.motionDetected });\n1437\t            if (link.ampHistory.length > CONFIG.tsMaxPoints) {\n1438\t                link.ampHistory.shift();\n1439\t            }\n1440\t        }\n1441\t\n1442\t        // Update charts if this is the selected link\n1443\t        if (state.selectedLinkID === linkID) {\n1444\t            if (now - state.lastChartUpdate >= CONFIG.chartUpdateMs) {\n1445\t                drawAmplitudeChart(frame);\n1446\t                drawTimeSeries(link.ampHistory);\n1447\t                state.lastChartUpdate = now;\n1448\t            }\n1449\t        }\n1450\t    }\n1451\t\n1452\t    // ============================================\n1453\t    // CSI Frame Parsing (matches Go binary format)\n1454\t    // ============================================\n1455\t    function parseCSIFrame(buffer) {\n1456\t        const view = new DataView(buffer);\n1457\t        const bytes = new Uint8Array(buffer);\n1458\t\n1459\t        if (bytes.length < 24) {\n1460\t            return null; // Header too short\n1461\t        }\n1462\t\n1463\t        const nodeMAC = formatMAC(bytes, 0);\n1464\t        const peerMAC = formatMAC(bytes, 6);\n1465\t        const timestampUS = view.getBigUint64(12, true); // little-endian\n1466\t        const rssi = view.getInt8(20);\n1467\t        const noiseFloor = view.getInt8(21);\n1468\t        const channel = bytes[22];\n1469\t        const nSub = bytes[23];\n1470\t\n1471\t        if (channel === 0 || channel > 14) {\n1472\t            return null; // Invalid channel\n1473\t        }\n1474\t\n1475\t        const expectedLen = 24 + nSub * 2;\n1476\t        if (bytes.length !== expectedLen) {\n1477\t            return null; // Payload length mismatch\n1478\t        }\n1479\t\n1480\t        // Extract I/Q pairs and compute amplitude\n1481\t        const subcarriers = [];\n1482\t        for (let i = 0; i < nSub; i++) {\n1483\t            const offset = 24 + i * 2;\n1484\t            const iVal = bytes[offset];\n1485\t            const qVal = bytes[offset + 1];\n1486\t            // Convert from unsigned to signed (JavaScript quirk)\n1487\t            const I = iVal > 127 ? iVal - 256 : iVal;\n1488\t            const Q = qVal > 127 ? qVal - 256 : qVal;\n1489\t            const amplitude = Math.sqrt(I * I + Q * Q);\n1490\t            subcarriers.push({ I, Q, amplitude });\n1491\t        }\n1492\t\n1493\t        return {\n1494\t            nodeMAC,\n1495\t            peerMAC,\n1496\t            linkID: `${nodeMAC}:${peerMAC}`,\n1497\t            timestampUS: Number(timestampUS),\n1498\t            rssi,\n1499\t            noiseFloor,\n1500\t            channel,\n1501\t            nSub,\n1502\t            subcarriers\n1503\t        };\n1504\t    }\n1505\t\n1506\t    function formatMAC(bytes, offset) {\n1507\t        const parts = [];\n1508\t        for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {\n1509\t            parts.push(bytes[offset + i].toString(16).padStart(2, '0').toUpperCase());\n1510\t        }\n1511\t        return parts.join(':');\n1512\t    }\n1513\t\n1514\t    // ============================================\n1515\t    // UI Updates\n1516\t    // ============================================\n1517\t    function updateNodeList() {\n1518\t        const container = document.getElementById('node-list');\n1519\t        document.getElementById('node-count').textContent = state.nodes.size;\n1520\t\n1521\t        if (state.nodes.size === 0) {\n1522\t            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"empty-state\">No nodes connected</div>';\n1523\t            return;\n1524\t        }\n1525\t\n1526\t        let html = '';\n1527\t        state.nodes.forEach((node, mac) => {\n1528\t            const isVirtual = !!node.virtual;\n1529\t            const isOnline = isVirtual || Date.now() - node.lastSeen < 30000;\n1530\t            const isUnpaired = !!node.unpaired;\n1531\t            const statusClass = isUnpaired ? 'unpaired' : (isVirtual ? 'virtual' : (isOnline ? 'online' : 'offline'));\n1532\t            const statusLabel = isUnpaired ? 'Unpaired' : (isVirtual ? 'Virtual' : (isOnline ? 'Online' : 'Offline'));\n1533\t\n1534\t            // Check for OTA rollback state\n1535\t            let rollbackBadge = '';\n1536\t            let otaBadge = '';\n1537\t            if (window.SpaxelOTA) {\n1538\t                const otaProgress = SpaxelOTA.getProgress();\n1539\t                if (otaProgress && otaProgress[mac]) {\n1540\t                    const p = otaProgress[mac];\n1541\t                    if (p.state === 'rollback') {\n1542\t                        rollbackBadge = '<span class=\"node-rollback-badge\">ROLLBACK</span>';\n1543\t                    } else if (p.state === 'downloading' || p.state === 'rebooting') {\n1544\t                        otaBadge = '<span class=\"node-ota-badge\">OTA ' + (p.progress_pct || 0) + '%</span>';\n1545\t                    } else if (p.state === 'verified') {\n1546\t                        otaBadge = '<span class=\"node-verified-badge\">UPDATED</span>';\n1547\t                    }\n1548\t                }\n1549\t            }\n1550\t\n1551\t            // Firmware version display (shortened)\n1552\t            const fwDisplay = node.firmware ? '<span class=\"node-fw\">' + escapeHtml(node.firmware) + '</span>' : '';\n1553\t\n1554\t            // Identify button (only for online nodes)\n1555\t            const identifyBtn = isOnline ? `<button class=\"node-identify-btn\" onclick=\"identifyNode('${mac}'); event.stopPropagation();\" title=\"Identify (blink LED)\">⚡</button>` : '';\n1556\t\n1557\t            html += `\n1558\t                <div class=\"node-item\" data-mac=\"${mac}\">\n1559\t                    <span class=\"node-mac\">${mac}</span>\n1560\t                    ${fwDisplay}\n1561\t                    ${rollbackBadge}\n1562\t                    ${otaBadge}\n1563\t                    <span class=\"node-status ${statusClass}\">\n1564\t                        ${statusLabel}\n1565\t                    </span>\n1566\t                    ${identifyBtn}\n1567\t                </div>\n1568\t            `;\n1569\t        });\n1570\t        container.innerHTML = html;\n1571\t\n1572\t        // Click-to-select for placement\n1573\t        container.querySelectorAll('.node-item').forEach(function (el) {\n1574\t            el.addEventListener('click', function () {\n1575\t                if (window.Placement) Placement.selectNode(el.dataset.mac);\n1576\t            });\n1577\t        });\n1578\t    }\n1579\t\n1580\t    function escapeHtml(s) {\n1581\t        if (!s) return '';\n1582\t        return String(s).replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');\n1583\t    }\n1584\t\n1585\t    // Identify node by blinking its LED\n1586\t    function identifyNode(mac, durationMs) {\n1587\t        const payload = durationMs ? JSON.stringify({ duration_ms: durationMs }) : JSON.stringify({});\n1588\t\n1589\t        fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/identify`, {\n1590\t            method: 'POST',\n1591\t            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n1592\t            body: payload\n1593\t        })\n1594\t        .then(res => {\n1595\t            if (!res.ok) {\n1596\t                throw new Error('Identify failed: ' + res.status);\n1597\t            }\n1598\t            return res.json();\n1599\t        })\n1600\t        .then(data => {\n1601\t            showToast(`Identify command sent to ${mac}`, 'success');\n1602\t        })\n1603\t        .catch(err => {\n1604\t            console.error('[Identify] Error:', err);\n1605\t            showToast(`Failed to identify ${mac}: ${err.message}`, 'error');\n1606\t        });\n1607\t    }\n1608\t\n1609\t    function updatePresenceIndicator() {\n1610\t        let anyMotion = false;\n1611\t        state.links.forEach(link => {\n1612\t            if (link.motionDetected) anyMotion = true;\n1613\t        });\n1614\t        const el = document.getElementById('presence-indicator');\n1615\t        if (anyMotion) {\n1616\t            el.className = 'motion';\n1617\t            el.textContent = 'MOTION';\n1618\t        } else {\n1619\t            el.className = 'clear';\n1620\t            el.textContent = 'CLEAR';\n1621\t        }\n1622\t    }\n1623\t\n1624\t    // ============================================\n1625\t    // Presence Panel\n1626\t    // ============================================\n1627\t    function handlePresenceUpdate(msg) {\n1628\t        if (!msg.links) return;\n1629\t\n1630\t        const now = performance.now();\n1631\t        let anyMotion = false;\n1632\t        let anyStationary = false;\n1633\t\n1634\t        for (const [linkID, info] of Object.entries(msg.links)) {\n1635\t            // Update link state if link exists\n1636\t            const link = state.links.get(linkID);\n1637\t            const prevBreathingState = link ? link.breathingState : 'CLEAR';\n1638\t            if (link) {\n1639\t                link.motionDetected = info.is_motion || info.motion_detected || false;\n1640\t                link.deltaRMS = info.delta_rms || 0;\n1641\t                // Phase 6: Breathing/dwell state\n1642\t                link.breathingState = info.breathing_state || 'CLEAR';\n1643\t                link.breathingBPM = info.breathing_bpm || 0;\n1644\t            }\n1645\t\n1646\t            if (info.is_motion || info.motion_detected) anyMotion = true;\n1647\t            if (info.breathing_state === 'STATIONARY_DETECTED') anyStationary = true;\n1648\t\n1649\t            // Log timeline event on transition to STATIONARY_DETECTED\n1650\t            const newBreathingState = info.breathing_state || 'CLEAR';\n1651\t            if (prevBreathingState !== 'STATIONARY_DETECTED' && newBreathingState === 'STATIONARY_DETECTED') {\n1652\t                const bpm = info.breathing_bpm || 0;\n1653\t                const shortID = abbreviateLinkID(linkID);\n1654\t                const timeStr = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();\n1655\t                logTimelineEvent('stationary_detected', linkID, 'Stationary person detected on ' + shortID + ' at ' + timeStr + ' - breathing at ' + bpm.toFixed(1) + ' BPM');\n1656\t            }\n1657\t\n1658\t            // Append to deltaRMS history\n1659\t            let history = state.drHistory.get(linkID);\n1660\t            if (!history) {\n1661\t                history = [];\n1662\t                state.drHistory.set(linkID, history);\n1663\t            }\n1664\t            history.push({ t: now, rms: info.delta_rms || 0 });\n1665\t\n1666\t            // Trim to window\n1667\t            const cutoff = now - CONFIG.drTsWindowMs;\n1668\t            while (history.length > 0 && history[0].t < cutoff) {\n1669\t                history.shift();\n1670\t            }\n1671\t            if (history.length > CONFIG.drTsMaxPoints) {\n1672\t                history.splice(0, history.length - CONFIG.drTsMaxPoints);\n1673\t            }\n1674\t        }\n1675\t\n1676\t        updatePresencePanel(msg.links, anyMotion, anyStationary);\n1677\t        updateLinkList();\n1678\t        drawDeltaRMSTimeSeries();\n1679\t    }\n1680\t\n1681\t    // Timeline event logging\n1682\t    function logTimelineEvent(eventType, linkID, message) {\n1683\t        // Log to console for debugging\n1684\t        console.log('[Timeline]', eventType, linkID, message);\n1685\t\n1686\t        // Show toast notification for stationary detection\n1687\t        if (eventType === 'stationary_detected') {\n1688\t            showToast(message, 'info');\n1689\t        }\n1690\t\n1691\t        // Could also append to a timeline panel in the UI if one exists\n1692\t        const timelineEl = document.getElementById('timeline-events');\n1693\t        if (timelineEl) {\n1694\t            const entry = document.createElement('div');\n1695\t            entry.className = 'timeline-entry timeline-' + eventType;\n1696\t            entry.innerHTML = '<span class=\"timeline-time\">' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString() + '</span> ' + message;\n1697\t            timelineEl.insertBefore(entry, timelineEl.firstChild);\n1698\t\n1699\t            // Keep only last 50 entries\n1700\t            while (timelineEl.children.length > 50) {\n1701\t                timelineEl.removeChild(timelineEl.lastChild);\n1702\t            }\n1703\t        }\n1704\t    }\n1705\t\n1706\t    function updatePresencePanel(links, anyMotion, anyStationary) {\n1707\t        const container = document.getElementById('presence-list');\n1708\t        const statusEl = document.getElementById('presence-status');\n1709\t\n1710\t        // Update status indicator with priority: motion > stationary > clear\n1711\t        if (anyMotion) {\n1712\t            statusEl.className = 'motion';\n1713\t            statusEl.textContent = 'MOTION';\n1714\t        } else if (anyStationary) {\n1715\t            statusEl.className = 'stationary';\n1716\t            statusEl.textContent = 'STATIONARY';\n1717\t        } else {\n1718\t            statusEl.className = 'clear';\n1719\t            statusEl.textContent = 'CLEAR';\n1720\t        }\n1721\t\n1722\t        const entries = Object.entries(links);\n1723\t        if (entries.length === 0) {\n1724\t            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"empty-state\">No links active</div>';\n1725\t            return;\n1726\t        }\n1727\t\n1728\t        let html = '';\n1729\t        for (const [linkID, info] of entries) {\n1730\t            const isMotion = info.is_motion || info.motion_detected || false;\n1731\t            const confidence = info.confidence || 0;\n1732\t            const rms = info.delta_rms || 0;\n1733\t            const breathingState = info.breathing_state || 'CLEAR';\n1734\t            const breathingBPM = info.breathing_bpm || 0;\n1735\t            const isStationary = breathingState === 'STATIONARY_DETECTED';\n1736\t            const shortID = abbreviateLinkID(linkID);\n1737\t            const selected = state.presenceSelectedLinkID === linkID ? 'selected' : '';\n1738\t\n1739\t            // Determine dot class based on state priority\n1740\t            let dotClass = 'clear';\n1741\t            let dotTitle = 'No motion detected';\n1742\t            if (isStationary) {\n1743\t                dotClass = 'stationary';\n1744\t                dotTitle = 'Stationary person detected - breathing at ' + breathingBPM.toFixed(1) + ' BPM';\n1745\t            } else if (isMotion && confidence > 0.7) {\n1746\t                dotClass = 'high-confidence';\n1747\t                dotTitle = 'High confidence motion detected';\n1748\t            } else if (isMotion) {\n1749\t                dotClass = 'motion';\n1750\t                dotTitle = 'Motion detected';\n1751\t            } else if (breathingState === 'POSSIBLY_PRESENT') {\n1752\t                dotClass = 'possibly';\n1753\t                dotTitle = 'Possibly present (waiting for confirmation)';\n1754\t            }\n1755\t\n1756\t            // Breathing info for tooltip/status\n1757\t            let breathingInfo = '';\n1758\t            if (isStationary) {\n1759\t                breathingInfo = '<span class=\"breathing-bpm\">' + breathingBPM.toFixed(1) + ' BPM</span>';\n1760\t            }\n1761\t\n1762\t            html += `\n1763\t                <div class=\"presence-row ${selected}\" data-link-id=\"${linkID}\" title=\"${dotTitle}\">\n1764\t                    <span class=\"presence-dot ${dotClass}\"></span>\n1765\t                    <span class=\"presence-link-id\">${shortID}</span>\n1766\t                    <span class=\"presence-rms\">${rms.toFixed(4)}</span>\n1767\t                    ${breathingInfo}\n1768\t                </div>\n1769\t            `;\n1770\t        }\n1771\t        container.innerHTML = html;\n1772\t\n1773\t        container.querySelectorAll('.presence-row').forEach(el => {\n1774\t            el.addEventListener('click', () => {\n1775\t                state.presenceSelectedLinkID = el.dataset.linkId;\n1776\t                updatePresencePanel(links, anyMotion, anyStationary);\n1777\t            });\n1778\t        });\n1779\t    }\n1780\t\n1781\t    function abbreviateLinkID(linkID) {\n1782\t        const parts = linkID.split(':');\n1783\t        if (parts.length >= 12) {\n1784\t            // Full MAC:MAC format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF:AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF\n1785\t            const nodeShort = parts.slice(3, 6).join(':');\n1786\t            const peerShort = parts.slice(9, 12).join(':');\n1787\t            return nodeShort + '\\u2192' + peerShort;\n1788\t        }\n1789\t        // Fallback: last segment of each side\n1790\t        const halves = linkID.split(':').reduce((acc, p, i, arr) => {\n1791\t            if (i < 6) acc[0].push(p);\n1792\t            else acc[1].push(p);\n1793\t            return acc;\n1794\t        }, [[], []]);\n1795\t        return halves[0].slice(-2).join(':') + '\\u2192' + halves[1].slice(-2).join(':');\n1796\t    }\n1797\t\n1798\t    function updateLinkList() {\n1799\t        const container = document.getElementById('link-list');\n1800\t        document.getElementById('link-count').textContent = state.links.size;\n1801\t\n1802\t        if (state.links.size === 0) {\n1803\t            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"empty-state\">No links active</div>';\n1804\t            return;\n1805\t        }\n1806\t\n1807\t        let html = '';\n1808\t        state.links.forEach((link, id) => {\n1809\t            const selected = state.selectedLinkID === id ? 'selected' : '';\n1810\t            const shortID = id.split(':').map(p => p.split(':').slice(-1)[0]).join('→');\n1811\t            const motionClass = link.motionDetected ? 'motion' : 'clear';\n1812\t            const motionLabel = link.motionDetected ? 'MOTION' : 'CLEAR';\n1813\t            html += `\n1814\t                <div class=\"link-item ${selected}\" data-link-id=\"${id}\">\n1815\t                    <span>${shortID}</span>\n1816\t                    <span class=\"presence-badge ${motionClass}\">${motionLabel}</span>\n1817\t                </div>\n1818\t            `;\n1819\t        });\n1820\t        container.innerHTML = html;\n1821\t\n1822\t        // Add click handlers\n1823\t        container.querySelectorAll('.link-item').forEach(el => {\n1824\t            el.addEventListener('click', () => selectLink(el.dataset.linkId));\n1825\t        });\n1826\t\n1827\t        updatePresenceIndicator();\n1828\t    }\n1829\t\n1830\t    function selectLink(linkID) {\n1831\t        state.selectedLinkID = linkID;\n1832\t        updateLinkList();\n1833\t\n1834\t        // Update chart title\n1835\t        document.querySelector('#chart-title .link-id').textContent = linkID || 'no link selected';\n1836\t\n1837\t        // Draw current data immediately if available\n1838\t        const link = state.links.get(linkID);\n1839\t        if (link) {\n1840\t            if (link.lastCSI) drawAmplitudeChart(link.lastCSI);\n1841\t            drawTimeSeries(link.ampHistory || []);\n1842\t        }\n1843\t\n1844\t        // Show diurnal baseline chart for this link\n1845\t        if (typeof DiurnalChart !== 'undefined' && DiurnalChart.showForLink) {\n1846\t            DiurnalChart.showForLink(linkID);\n1847\t        }\n1848\t    }\n1849\t\n1850\t    // ============================================\n1851\t    // Amplitude Chart (Canvas 2D) + Time Series\n1852\t    // ============================================\n1853\t    let chartCanvas, chartCtx;\n1854\t    let tsCanvas, tsCtx;\n1855\t    let drCanvas, drCtx;\n1856\t\n1857\t    function initChart() {\n1858\t        chartCanvas = document.getElementById('amplitude-chart');\n1859\t        chartCtx = chartCanvas.getContext('2d');\n1860\t\n1861\t        const rect = chartCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n1862\t        chartCanvas.width = rect.width * window.devicePixelRatio;\n1863\t        chartCanvas.height = rect.height * window.devicePixelRatio;\n1864\t        chartCtx.scale(window.devicePixelRatio, window.devicePixelRatio);\n1865\t\n1866\t        drawEmptyChart();\n1867\t\n1868\t        tsCanvas = document.getElementById('timeseries-chart');\n1869\t        tsCtx = tsCanvas.getContext('2d');\n1870\t\n1871\t        const tsRect = tsCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n1872\t        tsCanvas.width = tsRect.width * window.devicePixelRatio;\n1873\t        tsCanvas.height = tsRect.height * window.devicePixelRatio;\n1874\t        tsCtx.scale(window.devicePixelRatio, window.devicePixelRatio);\n1875\t\n1876\t        drawTimeSeries([]);\n1877\t\n1878\t        drCanvas = document.getElementById('deltarms-chart');\n1879\t        drCtx = drCanvas.getContext('2d');\n1880\t\n1881\t        const drRect = drCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n1882\t        drCanvas.width = drRect.width * window.devicePixelRatio;\n1883\t        drCanvas.height = drRect.height * window.devicePixelRatio;\n1884\t        drCtx.scale(window.devicePixelRatio, window.devicePixelRatio);\n1885\t\n1886\t        drawDeltaRMSTimeSeries();\n1887\t    }\n1888\t\n1889\t    function drawEmptyChart() {\n1890\t        const width = chartCanvas.width / window.devicePixelRatio;\n1891\t        const height = chartCanvas.height / window.devicePixelRatio;\n1892\t\n1893\t        chartCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';\n1894\t        chartCtx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n1895\t\n1896\t        chartCtx.fillStyle = '#444';\n1897\t        chartCtx.font = '12px sans-serif';\n1898\t        chartCtx.textAlign = 'center';\n1899\t        chartCtx.fillText('No data', width / 2, height / 2);\n1900\t    }\n1901\t\n1902\t    function drawAmplitudeChart(frame) {\n1903\t        const width = chartCanvas.width / window.devicePixelRatio;\n1904\t        const height = chartCanvas.height / window.devicePixelRatio;\n1905\t\n1906\t        // Clear\n1907\t        chartCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';\n1908\t        chartCtx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n1909\t\n1910\t        const subcarriers = frame.subcarriers;\n1911\t        const nSub = subcarriers.length;\n1912\t        if (nSub === 0) return;\n1913\t\n1914\t        const barWidth = width / nSub;\n1915\t        const padding = 1;\n1916\t\n1917\t        // Find max amplitude for scaling\n1918\t        let maxAmp = 0;\n1919\t        subcarriers.forEach(s => {\n1920\t            if (s.amplitude > maxAmp) maxAmp = s.amplitude;\n1921\t        });\n1922\t        if (maxAmp === 0) maxAmp = 1;\n1923\t\n1924\t        // Draw bars\n1925\t        for (let i = 0; i < nSub; i++) {\n1926\t            const amp = subcarriers[i].amplitude;\n1927\t            const barHeight = (amp / maxAmp) * (height - 10);\n1928\t            const x = i * barWidth + padding;\n1929\t            const y = height - barHeight;\n1930\t\n1931\t            // Gradient color based on amplitude\n1932\t            const intensity = amp / maxAmp;\n1933\t            const r = Math.floor(79 + intensity * (255 - 79));\n1934\t            const g = Math.floor(195 - intensity * 100);\n1935\t            const b = Math.floor(247 - intensity * 150);\n1936\t            chartCtx.fillStyle = `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`;\n1937\t\n1938\t            chartCtx.fillRect(x, y, barWidth - padding * 2, barHeight);\n1939\t        }\n1940\t\n1941\t        // Draw channel/rssi info\n1942\t        chartCtx.fillStyle = '#666';\n1943\t        chartCtx.font = '10px monospace';\n1944\t        chartCtx.textAlign = 'left';\n1945\t        chartCtx.fillText(`CH${frame.channel} RSSI:${frame.rssi}dBm`, 4, height - 4);\n1946\t    }\n1947\t\n1948\t    function drawTimeSeries(history) {\n1949\t        if (!tsCanvas) return;\n1950\t        const width = tsCanvas.width / window.devicePixelRatio;\n1951\t        const height = tsCanvas.height / window.devicePixelRatio;\n1952\t\n1953\t        tsCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';\n1954\t        tsCtx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n1955\t\n1956\t        if (history.length < 2) {\n1957\t            tsCtx.fillStyle = '#444';\n1958\t            tsCtx.font = '10px sans-serif';\n1959\t            tsCtx.textAlign = 'center';\n1960\t            tsCtx.fillText('Waiting for data…', width / 2, height / 2 + 4);\n1961\t            return;\n1962\t        }\n1963\t\n1964\t        // Find max amplitude for y-scale (with a minimum floor)\n1965\t        let maxAmp = 1;\n1966\t        for (let i = 0; i < history.length; i++) {\n1967\t            if (history[i].amp > maxAmp) maxAmp = history[i].amp;\n1968\t        }\n1969\t\n1970\t        const padTop = 4;\n1971\t        const padBottom = 14; // room for time label\n1972\t        const plotH = height - padTop - padBottom;\n1973\t        const xStep = width / (CONFIG.tsMaxPoints - 1);\n1974\t\n1975\t        // Draw zero line\n1976\t        tsCtx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';\n1977\t        tsCtx.lineWidth = 1;\n1978\t        tsCtx.beginPath();\n1979\t        tsCtx.moveTo(0, padTop + plotH);\n1980\t        tsCtx.lineTo(width, padTop + plotH);\n1981\t        tsCtx.stroke();\n1982\t\n1983\t        // Draw amplitude line, colored by motion state\n1984\t        const startIdx = Math.max(0, CONFIG.tsMaxPoints - history.length);\n1985\t        tsCtx.lineWidth = 1.5;\n1986\t\n1987\t        for (let i = 0; i < history.length - 1; i++) {\n1988\t            const x0 = (startIdx + i) * xStep;\n1989\t            const x1 = (startIdx + i + 1) * xStep;\n1990\t            const y0 = padTop + plotH - (history[i].amp / maxAmp) * plotH;\n1991\t            const y1 = padTop + plotH - (history[i + 1].amp / maxAmp) * plotH;\n1992\t\n1993\t            tsCtx.strokeStyle = history[i].motion ? 'rgba(239,83,80,0.8)' : 'rgba(102,187,106,0.7)';\n1994\t            tsCtx.beginPath();\n1995\t            tsCtx.moveTo(x0, y0);\n1996\t            tsCtx.lineTo(x1, y1);\n1997\t            tsCtx.stroke();\n1998\t        }\n1999\t\n2000\t        // Time label: oldest → newest\n2001\t        const oldest = history[0].t;\n2002\t        const newest = history[history.length - 1].t;\n2003\t        const spanS = ((newest - oldest) / 1000).toFixed(0);\n2004\t        tsCtx.fillStyle = '#555';\n2005\t        tsCtx.font = '9px monospace';\n2006\t        tsCtx.textAlign = 'left';\n2007\t        tsCtx.fillText(`-${spanS}s`, 2, height - 2);\n2008\t        tsCtx.textAlign = 'right';\n2009\t        tsCtx.fillText('now', width - 2, height - 2);\n2010\t    }\n2011\t\n2012\t    function
