 }\n\n        const padTop = 4;\n        const padBottom = 14; // room for time label\n        const plotH = height - padTop - padBottom;\n        const xStep = width / (CONFIG.tsMaxPoints - 1);\n\n        // Draw zero line\n        tsCtx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';\n        tsCtx.lineWidth = 1;\n        tsCtx.beginPath();\n        tsCtx.moveTo(0, padTop + plotH);\n        tsCtx.lineTo(width, padTop + plotH);\n        tsCtx.stroke();\n\n        // Draw amplitude line, colored by motion state\n        const startIdx = Math.max(0, CONFIG.tsMaxPoints - history.length);\n        tsCtx.lineWidth = 1.5;\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < history.length - 1; i++) {\n            const x0 = (startIdx + i) * xStep;\n            const x1 = (startIdx + i + 1) * xStep;\n            const y0 = padTop + plotH - (history[i].amp / maxAmp) * plotH;\n            const y1 = padTop + plotH - (history[i + 1].amp / maxAmp) * plotH;\n\n            tsCtx.strokeStyle = history[i].motion ? 'rgba(239,83,80,0.8)' : 'rgba(102,187,106,0.7)';\n            tsCtx.beginPath();\n            tsCtx.moveTo(x0, y0);\n            tsCtx.lineTo(x1, y1);\n            tsCtx.stroke();\n        }\n\n        // Time label: oldest → newest\n        const oldest = history[0].t;\n        const newest = history[history.length - 1].t;\n        const spanS = ((newest - oldest) / 1000).toFixed(0);\n        tsCtx.fillStyle = '#555';\n        tsCtx.font = '9px monospace';\n        tsCtx.textAlign = 'left';\n        tsCtx.fillText(`-${spanS}s`, 2, height - 2);\n        tsCtx.textAlign = 'right';\n        tsCtx.fillText('now', width - 2, height - 2);\n    }\n\n    function drawDeltaRMSTimeSeries() {\n        if (!drCanvas) return;\n        const width = drCanvas.width / window.devicePixelRatio;\n        const height = drCanvas.height / window.devicePixelRatio;\n\n        drCtx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';\n        drCtx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        const linkID = state.presenceSelectedLinkID;\n        const history = linkID ? state.drHistory.get(linkID) : null;\n\n        if (!history || history.length < 2) {\n            drCtx.fillStyle = '#444';\n            drCtx.font = '10px sans-serif';\n            drCtx.textAlign = 'center';\n            drCtx.fillText('Select a link', width / 2, height / 2 + 4);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const padTop = 4;\n        const padBottom = 14;\n        const plotH = height - padTop - padBottom;\n\n        // Y-axis range: 0 to 0.1 (typical deltaRMS range)\n        const yMax = 0.1;\n\n        // Draw threshold line at 0.02\n        const threshY = padTop + plotH - (CONFIG.drThreshold / yMax) * plotH;\n        drCtx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 167, 38, 0.5)';\n        drCtx.lineWidth = 1;\n        drCtx.setLineDash([4, 3]);\n        drCtx.beginPath();\n        drCtx.moveTo(0, threshY);\n        drCtx.lineTo(width, threshY);\n        drCtx.stroke();\n        drCtx.setLineDash([]);\n\n        // Threshold label\n        drCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 167, 38, 0.7)';\n        drCtx.font = '9px monospace';\n        drCtx.textAlign = 'left';\n        drCtx.fillText('0.02', 2, threshY - 2);\n\n        // Time range\n        const tEnd = history[history.length - 1].t;\n        const tStart = tEnd - CONFIG.drTsWindowMs;\n\n        // Draw deltaRMS line\n        drCtx.lineWidth = 1.5;\n        drCtx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(79, 195, 247, 0.8)';\n        drCtx.beginPath();\n        let started = false;\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < history.length; i++) {\n            const x = ((history[i].t - tStart) / CONFIG.drTsWindowMs) * width;\n            const y = padTop + plotH - (Math.min(history[i].rms, yMax) / yMax) * plotH;\n\n            if (!started) {\n                drCtx.moveTo(x, y);\n                started = true;\n            } else {\n                drCtx.lineTo(x, y);\n            }\n        }\n        drCtx.stroke();\n\n        // Fill area under curve\n        if (history.length >= 2) {\n            const lastX = ((history[history.length - 1].t - tStart) / CONFIG.drTsWindowMs) * width;\n            const firstX = ((history[0].t - tStart) / CONFIG.drTsWindowMs) * width;\n            drCtx.lineTo(lastX, padTop + plotH);\n            drCtx.lineTo(firstX, padTop + plotH);\n            drCtx.closePath();\n            drCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(79, 195, 247, 0.08)';\n            drCtx.fill();\n        }\n\n        // Time labels\n        drCtx.fillStyle = '#555';\n        drCtx.font = '9px monospace';\n        drCtx.textAlign = 'left';\n        drCtx.fillText('-10s', 2, height - 2);\n        drCtx.textAlign = 'right';\n        drCtx.fillText('now', width - 2, height - 2);\n\n        // Y-axis labels\n        drCtx.textAlign = 'right';\n        drCtx.fillText('0.1', width - 2, padTop + 10);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // URL Parameter Handling\n    // ============================================\n    function handleURLParameters() {\n        // Parse URL parameters for camera fly-to and other features\n        const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n        const highlightMAC = params.get('highlight');\n\n        if (highlightMAC && window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.flyToNode) {\n            console.log('[Spaxel] Highlight parameter found, flying to node:', highlightMAC);\n            // Wait a bit for scene to fully initialize before flying\n            setTimeout(function() {\n                window.Viz3D.flyToNode(highlightMAC);\n                // Clear the parameter from URL without reloading\n                const url = new URL(window.location);\n                url.searchParams.delete('highlight');\n                window.history.replaceState({}, '', url);\n            }, 500);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Initialization\n    // ============================================\n    function init() {\n        console.log('[Spaxel] Dashboard initializing...');\n\n        // Parse frame rate cap from URL parameter before renderer init\n        // ?maxFps=30  → cap at 30 FPS on mobile (default for struggling devices)\n        // ?maxFps=60  → no cap, let auto-detection decide\n        // ?maxFps=0   → disable frame rate capping and auto-detection entirely\n        const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n        const maxFpsParam = urlParams.get('maxFps');\n        if (maxFpsParam !== null) {\n            const fps = parseInt(maxFpsParam, 10);\n            if (!isNaN(fps) && fps >= 0 && fps <= 60) {\n                if (fps === 0) {\n                    CONFIG.autoDetectStrugglingDevice = false;\n                    CONFIG.mobileFrameRateCap = 60;\n                } else {\n                    CONFIG.mobileFrameRateCap = fps;\n                }\n                console.log('[Spaxel] Frame rate cap set to ' + (fps === 0 ? 'disabled' : fps + ' FPS') + ' via URL parameter');\n            } else {\n                console.warn('[Spaxel] Invalid maxFps value: ' + maxFpsParam + ' (must be 0-60)');\n            }\n        }\n\n        initScene();\n        initChart();\n        connectWebSocket();\n        startHealthPolling();\n        startDiurnalPolling();\n        animate();\n\n        // Handle URL parameters after initialization\n        handleURLParameters();\n\n        console.log('[Spaxel] Dashboard ready');\n    }\n\n    // Start when DOM is ready\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n    } else {\n        init();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // ============================================\n\n    // Message handlers registered by other modules (e.g., FleetPanel)\n    const messageHandlers = [];\n\n    function registerMessageHandler(handler) {\n        if (typeof handler === 'function') {\n            messageHandlers.push(handler);\n        }\n    }\n\n    window.SpaxelApp = {\n        getLinks: function () { return state.links; },\n        getNodes: function () { return state.nodes; },\n        refreshNodeList: updateNodeList,\n        refreshLinkList: updateLinkList,\n        showToast: showToast,\n        registerMessageHandler: registerMessageHandler,\n\n        /**\n         * Get the current target frame rate.\n         * @returns {number} Target FPS (60 for desktop, 30-60 for mobile)\n         */\n        getTargetFPS: function() {\n            return state.targetFPS;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Get whether the device is currently in struggling mode.\n         * @returns {boolean} True if frame rate is capped due to poor performance\n         */\n        isStrugglingDevice: function() {\n            return state.strugglingDevice;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Get the current FPS history for debugging.\n         * @returns {Array<number>} Array of recent FPS samples\n         */\n        getFPSHistory: function() {\n            return state.fpsHistory.slice();\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Set a manual frame rate cap (overrides auto-detection).\n         * @param {number} fps - Target FPS (30 for struggling mobile, 60 for normal, null to reset)\n         */\n        setFrameRateCap: function(fps) {\n            if (fps === null || fps === undefined) {\n                // Reset to auto-detection\n                state.manualFrameRateCap = null;\n                if (state.strugglingDevice) {\n                    // Keep struggling mode cap\n                    state.targetFPS = CONFIG.mobileFrameRateCap || 30;\n                    state.minFrameTime = 1000 / state.targetFPS;\n                } else {\n                    // Restore to 60 FPS\n                    state.targetFPS = 60;\n                    state.minFrameTime = 1000 / 60;\n                }\n                console.log('[Spaxel] Frame rate cap reset to auto-detection (target: ' + state.targetFPS + ' FPS)');\n            } else if (typeof fps === 'number' && fps > 0 && fps <= 60) {\n                // Set manual cap\n                state.manualFrameRateCap = fps;\n                state.targetFPS = fps;\n                state.minFrameTime = 1000 / fps;\n                console.log('[Spaxel] Frame rate manually capped at ' + fps + ' FPS');\n            } else {\n                console.warn('[Spaxel] Invalid frame rate cap: ' + fps + ' (must be 1-60)');\n            }\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Enable or disable auto-detection of struggling devices.\n         * @param {boolean} enabled - Whether to enable auto-detection\n         */\n        setAutoDetectStrugglingDevice: function(enabled) {\n            CONFIG.autoDetectStrugglingDevice = enabled;\n            console.log('[Spaxel] Auto-detect struggling device: ' + (enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'));\n        }\n    };\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Crowd Flow Visualization Controls\n    // Global wrappers for HTML onchange handlers -> Viz3D module\n    // ============================================\n    window.identifyNode = identifyNode;\n\n    window.toggleFlowLayer = function(visible) {\n        Viz3D.setFlowLayerVisible(visible);\n    };\n\n    window.toggleDwellLayer = function(visible) {\n        Viz3D.setDwellLayerVisible(visible);\n    };\n\n    window.toggleCorridorLayer = function(visible) {\n        Viz3D.setCorridorLayerVisible(visible);\n    };\n\n    window.setFlowTimeFilter = function(value) {\n        Viz3D.setFlowTimeFilter(value);\n    };\n\n    window.toggleFresnelZones = function() {\n        if (window.Layers) {\n            Layers.toggleLayer(Layers.LAYERS.FRESNEL);\n        } else {\n            // Fallback without Layers module\n            var btn = document.getElementById('fresnel-toggle-btn');\n            var isActive = btn && btn.classList.contains('active');\n            toggleFresnelDebugOverlay(!isActive);\n        }\n    };\n\n    // Expose for viz3d.js to call when links rebuild\n    window.rebuildFresnelDebugEllipsoids = function() {\n        if (state.fresnelDebugVisible) {\n            rebuildFresnelDebugEllipsoids();\n        }\n    };\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Fresnel Zone Debug Overlay\n    // ============================================\n\n    /**\n     * Toggle Fresnel zone debug overlay for all active links.\n     * @param {boolean} visible - Whether to show Fresnel zones\n     */\n    window.toggleFresnelDebugOverlay = function(visible) {\n        state.fresnelDebugVisible = visible;\n\n        // Sync toolbar button\n        var btn = document.getElementById('fresnel-toggle-btn');\n        if (btn) {\n            if (visible) btn.classList.add('active');\n            else btn.classList.remove('active');\n        }\n\n        if (visible) {\n            rebuildFresnelDebugEllipsoids();\n        } else {\n            clearFresnelDebugEllipsoids();\n        }\n    };\n\n    /**\n     * Rebuild Fresnel zone ellipsoids for all active links.\n     * Called when the overlay is toggled on or when links change.\n     */\n    function rebuildFresnelDebugEllipsoids() {\n        if (!state.fresnelDebugVisible) return;\n        if (!window.Fresnel) {\n            console.warn('[Fresnel Debug] Fresnel module not loaded');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Clear existing ellipsoids\n        clearFresnelDebugEllipsoids();\n\n        // Get node positions from Viz3D\n        var nodeMeshes = (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.getNodeMeshes) ? Viz3D.getNodeMeshes() : new Map();\n\n        // Create ellipsoids for each active link\n        state.links.forEach(function(link, linkID) {\n            var parts = linkID.split(':');\n            if (parts.length < 2) return;\n\n            var txMAC = link.nodeMAC || parts[0];\n            var rxMAC = link.peerMAC || parts[1];\n\n            var txMesh = nodeMeshes.get(txMAC);\n            var rxMesh = nodeMeshes.get(rxMAC);\n\n            if (!txMesh || !rxMesh) return;\n\n            var tx = txMesh.position;\n            var rx = rxMesh.position;\n\n            // Get channel from link's last CSI frame (default to 6 for 2.4 GHz)\n            var channel = link.channel || 6;\n\n            // Get per-link health score from Viz3D\n            var healthScore = 0.5;\n            if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.getLinkHealth) {\n                var healthData = Viz3D.getLinkHealth(linkID);\n                if (healthData) healthScore = healthData.score;\n            }\n            var color = getFresnelHealthColor(healthScore);\n\n            // Create Fresnel ellipsoid\n            var ellipsoid = window.Fresnel.addFresnelEllipsoid(tx, rx, channel, color);\n            if (ellipsoid) {\n                // Store link info in userData for interactions\n                ellipsoid.wireframe.userData.linkID = linkID;\n                ellipsoid.wireframe.userData.txMAC = txMAC;\n                ellipsoid.wireframe.userData.rxMAC = rxMAC;\n                ellipsoid.wireframe.userData.healthScore = healthScore;\n                ellipsoid.fill.userData.linkID = linkID;\n                ellipsoid.fill.userData.txMAC = txMAC;\n                ellipsoid.fill.userData.rxMAC = rxMAC;\n                ellipsoid.fill.userData.healthScore = healthScore;\n\n                state.fresnelEllipsoids.set(linkID, ellipsoid);\n            }\n        });\n\n        console.log('[Fresnel Debug] Created ' + state.fresnelEllipsoids.size + ' Fresnel ellipsoids');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Clear all Fresnel debug ellipsoids from the scene.\n     */\n    function clearFresnelDebugEllipsoids() {\n        state.fresnelEllipsoids.forEach(function(ellipsoid) {\n            if (window.Fresnel) {\n                window.Fresnel.removeFresnelEllipsoid(ellipsoid);\n            }\n        });\n        state.fresnelEllipsoids.clear();\n        hideFresnelTooltip();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get color for Fresnel zone based on link health score.\n     * @param {number} score - Health score (0-1)\n     * @returns {number} Color hex value\n     */\n    function getFresnelHealthColor(score) {\n        if (score >= 0.7) return 0x66bb6a; // green\n        if (score >= 0.4) return 0xeab308; // yellow\n        return 0xef4444; // red\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Handle mouse move events for Fresnel ellipsoid hover detection.\n     */\n    function onFresnelMouseMove(event) {\n        if (!state.fresnelDebugVisible) return;\n\n        // Calculate mouse position in normalized device coordinates\n        var rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();\n        state.fresnelMouse.x = ((event.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1;\n        state.fresnelMouse.y = -((event.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;\n\n        // Raycast against all Fresnel ellipsoids\n        state.fresnelRaycaster.setFromCamera(state.fresnelMouse, camera);\n\n        var intersects = [];\n        state.fresnelEllipsoids.forEach(function(ellipsoid) {\n            var result = state.fresnelRaycaster.intersectObject(ellipsoid.fill, true);\n            if (result.length > 0) {\n                intersects.push(result[0]);\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (intersects.length > 0) {\n            var intersect = intersects[0];\n updateFresnelTooltipPosition(event);\n            }\n        } else {\n            if (state.fresnelHoveredEllipsoid !== null) {\n                // Hover ended\n {\n                linkItem.classList.remove('flash-highlight');\n            }, 1000);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Highlight or unhighlight a link when its Fresnel ellipsoid is hovered.\n     * @param {string} linkID - Link ID\n     * @param {boolean} highlight - Whether to highlight\n     */\n    function highlightFresnelLink(linkID, highlight) {\n        var linkItem = document.querySelector('.link-item[data-link-id=\"' + linkID + '\"]');\n        if (linkItem) {\n            if (highlight) {\n                linkItem.classList.add('fresnel-hover');\n            } else {\n                linkItem.classList.remove('fresnel-hover');\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Also highlight the link line in 3D\n        if (window.Viz3D) {\n            if (highlight) Viz3D.getLinkHealth(linkID) : null;\n                var score = healthData ? healthData.score : 0.5;\n                var color = getFresnelHealthColor(score);\n                if (Viz3D.highlightLink) Viz3D.highlightLink(linkID, color);\n            } else {\n                // Rebuild link lines to restore normal appearance\n                if (Viz3D.applyLinks) {\n                    var links = [];\n                    state.links.forEach(function(link, id) {\n                        links.push({ id: id, node_mac: link.nodeMAC, peer_mac: link.peerMAC });\n                    });\n                    Viz3D.applyLinks(links);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Show tooltip with Fresnel ellipsoid details.\n     * @param {MouseEvent} event - Mouse event\n     * @param {string} linkID - Link ID\n     * @param {THREE.Vector3} point - 3D point of intersection\n     */\n    function showFresnelTooltip(event, linkID, point) {\n        var tooltip = document.getElementById('fresnel-tooltip');\n        if (!tooltip) {\n            tooltip = document.createElement('div');\n            tooltip.id = 'fresnel-tooltip';\n            tooltip.className = 'fresnel-tooltip';\n            document.body.appendChild(tooltip);\n        }\n\n        var link = state.links.get(linkID);\n        var ellipsoid = state.fresnelEllipsoids.get(linkID);\n        if (!link || !ellipsoid) return;\n\n        var data = ellipsoid.data;\n        var healthScore = 0.5;\n        if (window.Viz3D && Viz3D.getLinkHealth) {\n            var healthData = Viz3D.getLinkHealth(linkID);\n            if (healthData) healthScore = healthData.score;\n        }\n\n        var txMAC = link.nodeMAC;\n        var rxMAC = link.peerMAC;\n        var txNode = state.nodes.get(txMAC);\n        var rxNode = state.nodes.get(rxMAC);\n        var txLabel = txNode ? (txNode.name || txNode.mac) : txMAC;\n        var rxLabel = rxNode ? updateFresnelTooltipPosition(event);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Update tooltip position based on mouse event.\n     * @param {MouseEvent} event - Mouse event\n     */\n    function updateFresnelTooltipPosition(event) {\n        var tooltip = document.getElementById('fresnel-tooltip');\n        if (!tooltip) return;\n\n        tooltip.style.left = (event.clientX + 15) + 'px';\n        tooltip.style.top = (event.clientY + 15) + 'px';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Hide the Fresnel tooltip.\n     */\n    function hideFresnelTooltip() {\n        var tooltip = {"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"msg_20260504142418c843bc6e7b6744a4","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"glm-4.7","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Good! Now I have a better understanding of the current state of the code. Let me analyze what needs to be done:\n\n1. **Touch events on sidebar panels should not propagate to the canvas** - The `controls.js` file already has `addPanelTouchBlocker` function with `stopPropagation()` on panel touch listeners. However, looking at the implementation, it's using `passive: true` which may not be sufficient for iOS Safari. The `stopPropagation()` should still work, but we need to verify the panel classes match what's being used in the HTML.\n\n2. **No iOS Safari passive event listener warnings** - The HTML has `touch-action: none` on `#scene-container` which is good. The CSS also has `touch-action: none` on the canvas. The `app.js` also sets inline styles for `touchAction = 'none'` on the canvas element.\n\n3. **Double-tap to zoom is disabled** - The viewport meta tag has `user-scalable=no` and `maximum-scale=1.0` which should prevent double-tap zoom. However, the `app.js` has some code to handle double-tap detection that uses `passive: false` on `touchend`, which is correct.\n\n4. **Pinch gesture should be accurate** - The `zoomSpeed` is set to 1.0 in `app.js` which is standard.\n\n5. **Three-finger pan is enabled** - Looking at the `app.js`, I see:\n   ```javascript\n   controls.touches = {\n       ONE: THREE.TOUCH.ROTATE,\n       TWO: THREE.TOUCH.DOLLY,\n       THREE: THREE.TOUCH.PAN\n   };\n   ```\n   This already enables three-finger pan!\n\nLooking more carefully at the code:\n- The `controls.js` file seems to be a module for preventing touch propagation from panels\n- The `expert.css` has the touch styles for panels and canvas\n- The `app.js` has OrbitControls configuration\n \nI'm examining the touch event handling in the JavaScript implementation. The current approach uses passive event listeners with stopPropagation(), which might not fully prevent event propagation in iOS Safari. The double-tap zoom prevention logic relies on timestamp comparison, which could potentially miss some rapid tap interactions. \n\nThe inline style for touch-action suggests an attempt to disable default browser zoom behaviors, but the implementation might need more robust event interception techniques to ensure consistent touch control across different mobile browsers. I'll verify the touch event propagation and panel classes. The controls module covers key panel classes, but there might be additional dynamic or overlay panels not captured. * Spaxel Dashboard - Panel Framework\n *\n * Provides slide-in sidebar, modal overlay, toast notifications,\n * and a panel registry for opening panels by name.\n */\n\n(function() {\n    'use strict';\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Panel Registry\n    // ============================================\n    const registeredPanels = new Map();\n\n    /**\n     * Register a panel constructor/creator function\n     * @param {string} name - Panel identifier\n     * @param {Function|Object} creator - Function that returns panel config, or panel config object\n     */\n    function registerPanel(name, creator) {\n        registeredPanels.set(name, creator);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Open a panel by name\n     * @param {string} name - Panel identifier\n     * @param {Object} options - Panel options (title, content, onOpen, onClose, etc.)\n     */\n    function openPanel(name, options) {\n        const creator = registeredPanels.get(name);\n        if (!creator) {\n            console.error('[Panels] Unknown panel:', name);\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        let config;\n        if (typeof creator === 'function') {\n            config = creator(options);\n        } else {\n            config = { ...creator, ...options };\n        }\n\n        return openSidebar(config);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Open a modal dialog\n     * @param {Object} options - Modal options (title, content, width, onConfirm, onCancel, etc.)\n     */\n    function openModal(options) {\n        return createModal(options);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Sidebar Panel\n    // ============================================\n    let currentSidebar = null;\n    let sidebarElement = null;\n    let {Object} options - Sidebar options\n     * @returns {Object} Panel control object with close() method\n     */\n    function openSidebar(options) {\n        // Close existing sidebar first\n        if (currentSidebar) {\n            closeSidebar();\n        }\n\n        const config = { ...defaultSidebarOptions, ...options };\n        const position = config.position;\n\n        // Create overlay\n        sidebarOverlay = document.createElement('div');\n        sidebarOverlay.className = 'panel-overlay';\n        sidebarOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n            if (config.closeOnOverlayClick && e.target === sidebarOverlay) {\n                closeSidebar();\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Create sidebar panel\n        sidebarElement = document.createElement('div');\n        sidebarElement.className = 'panel-sidebar panel-sidebar-' + position + ' ' + config.className;\n        sidebarElement.style.width = config.width;\n\n        // Sidebar header\n        const header = document.createElement('div');\n        header.className = 'panel-header';\n\n        const title = document.createElement('h2');\n        title.className = 'panel-title';\n        title.textContent = config.title;\n\n        const closeButton = document.createElement('button');\n        closeButton.className = 'panel-close';\n        closeButton.innerHTML = '&times;';\n        closeButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Close');\n        closeButton.addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);\n\n        header.appendChild(title);\n        header.appendChild(closeButton);\n\n        // Sidebar content\n        const content = document.createElement('div');\n        content.className = 'panel-content';\n\n        if (typeof config.content === 'string') {\n            content.innerHTML = config.content;\n        } else if (config.content instanceof HTMLElement) {\n            content.appendChild(config.content);\n        } else if (typeof config.content === 'function') {\n            const result = config.content(content);\n            if (result instanceof HTMLElement) {\n                content.innerHTML = '';\n                content.appendChild(result);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Assemble sidebar\n        sidebarElement.appendChild(header);\n        sidebarElement.appendChild(content);\n\n        // Add touch event listeners to prevent propagation to canvas\n        // This prevents OrbitControls from responding to touches on the panel\n        // Using passive listeners with stopPropagation to avoid iOS warnings\n        sidebarElement.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        sidebarElement.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        sidebarElement.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        // Also add to overlay to prevent canvas touches through backdrop\n        sidebarOverlay.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        sidebarOverlay.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        sidebarOverlay.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        // Add to DOM\n        document.body.appendChild(sidebarOverlay);\n        document.body.appendChild(sidebarElement);\n\n        // Trigger animation\n        requestAnimationFrame(function() {\n            sidebarOverlay.classList.add('panel-overlay-visible');\n            sidebarElement.classList.add('panel-sidebar-visible');\n        });\n\n        // Store panel control\n        currentSidebar = {\n            close: closeSidebar,\n            element: sidebarElement,\n            config: config\n        };\n\n        // Call onOpen callback\n        if (config.onOpen) {\n            config.onOpen(content, currentSidebar);\n        }\n\n        // Handle escape key\n        if (config.closeOnEscape) {\n            document.addEventListener('keydown', handleEscape);\n        }\n\n        return currentSidebar;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Close the current sidebar\n     */\n    function closeSidebar() {\n        if (!currentSidebar) return;\n\n        const config = currentSidebar.config;\n\n        // Trigger close animation\n        if (sidebarOverlay) {\n            sidebarOverlay.classList.remove('panel-overlay-visible');\n        }\n        if (sidebarElement) {\n            sidebarElement.classList.remove('panel-sidebar-visible');\n        }\n\n        // Remove from DOM after animation\n        setTimeout(function() {\n            if (sidebarOverlay && sidebarOverlay.parentNode) {\n                sidebarOverlay.parentNode.removeChild(sidebarOverlay);\n            }\n            if (sidebarElement && sidebarElement.parentNode) {\n                sidebarElement.parentNode.removeChild(sidebarElement);\n            }\n\n            sidebarOverlay = null;\n            sidebarElement = null;\n        }, 300);\n\n        // Call onClose callback\n        if (config.onClose) {\n            config.onClose();\n        }\n\n        // Remove escape handler\n        document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleEscape);\n\n        currentSidebar = null;\n    }\n\n    function handleEscape(e) {\n        if (e.key === 'Escape' && currentSidebar) {\n            closeSidebar();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if a sidebar is currently open\n     */\n    function isSidebarOpen() {\n        return currentSidebar !== null;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Modal Overlay\n    // confirmText: 'OK',\n        cancelText: 'Cancel',\n        onOpen: null,\n        onClose: null,\n        onConfirm: null,\n        onCancel: null,\n        className: ''\n    };\n\n    /**\n     * Open a modal dialog\n     * @param {Object} options - Modal options\n     * @returns {Object} Modal control object with close() method\n     */\n    function createModal(options) {\n        // Close existing modal first\n        if (currentModal) {\n            closeModal();\n        }\n\n        const config = { ...defaultModalOptions, ...options };\n\n        // Create backdrop\n        modalBackdrop = document.createElement('div');\n        modalBackdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop';\n        modalBackdrop.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n            if (config.closeOnBackdropClick && e.target === modalBackdrop) {\n                closeModal();\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Create modal container\n        modalElement = document.createElement('div');\n        modalElement.className = 'modal-container ' + config.className;\n        modalElement.style.width = config.width;\n        modalElement.style.maxWidth = 'modal-header';\n\n            const title = document.createElement('h3');\n            title.className = 'modal-title';\n            title.textContent = config.title;\n\n            const closeButton = document.createElement('button');\n            closeButton.className = 'modal-close';\n            closeButton.innerHTML = '&times;';\n            closeButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Close');\n            closeButton.addEventListener('click', closeModal);\n\n            header.appendChild(title);\n            header.appendChild(closeButton);\n            modalElement.appendChild(header);\n        }\n\n        // Modal content\n        const content = document.createElement('div');\n        content.className = 'modal-content';\n\n        if (typeof config.content === 'string') {\n            content.innerHTML = config.content;\n        } else if (config.content instanceof HTMLElement) {\n            content.appendChild(config.content);\n        } else if (typeof config.content === OrbitControls from responding to touches on the modal\n        // Using passive listeners with stopPropagation to avoid iOS warnings\n        modalElement.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        modalElement.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        modalElement.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        // Also add to backdrop to prevent canvas touches through backdrop\n        modalBackdrop.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        modalBackdrop.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        modalBackdrop.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n        }, { passive: true });\n\n        // Modal footer (if buttons requested)\n        if (config.showConfirm || config.showCancel) {\n            const footer = document.createElement('div');\n            footer.className = 'modal-footer';\n\n            if (config.showCancel) {\n                const cancelButton = document.createElement('button');\n                cancelButton.className = 'modal-btn modal-btn-cancel';\n                cancelButton.textContent = config.cancelText;\n                cancelButton.addEventListener('click', function() {\n                    if (config.onCancel) {\n                        config.onCancel();\n                    }\n                    closeModal();\n                });\n                footer.appendChild(cancelButton);\n            }\n\n            if (config.showConfirm) {\n                const confirmButton = document.createElement('button');\n                confirmButton.className = 'modal-btn modal-btn-confirm';\n                confirmButton.textContent = config.confirmText;\n                confirmButton.addEventListener('click', function() {\n                    if (config.onConfirm) {\n                        const result = config.onConfirm();\n                        // If onConfirm returns false, don't close modal\n                        if (result === false) return;\n                    }\n                    closeModal();\n                });\n                footer.appendChild(confirmButton);\n            }\n\n            modalElement.appendChild(footer);\n        }\n\n        // Add to DOM\n        modalBackdrop.appendChild(modalElement);\n        document.body.appendChild(modalBackdrop);\n\n        // Trigger animation\n        requestAnimationFrame(function() {\n            modalBackdrop.classList.add('modal-backdrop-visible');\n            modalElement.classList.add('modal-container-visible');\n        });\n\n        // Store modal control\n        currentModal = {\n            close: closeModal,\n            element: modalElement,\n            backdrop: modalBackdrop,\n            config: config\n        };\n\n        // Call onOpen callback\n        if (config.onOpen) {\n            config.onOpen(content, currentModal);\n        }\n\n        // Handle escape key\n        if (config.closeOnEscape) {\n            document.addEventListener('keydown', handleModalEscape);\n        }\n\n        return currentModal;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Close the current modal\n     */\n    function closeModal() {\n        if (!currentModal) return;\n\n        const config = currentModal.config;\n\n        // Trigger close animation\n        if (modalBackdrop) {\n            modalBackdrop.classList.remove('modal-backdrop-visible');\n        }\n        if (modalElement) {\n            modalElement.classList.remove('modal-container-visible');\n        }\n\n        // Remove from DOM after animation\n        setTimeout(function() {\n            if (modalBackdrop && modalBackdrop.parentNode) {\n                modalBackdrop.parentNode.removeChild(modalBackdrop);\n            }\n\n            modalBackdrop = null;\n            modalElement = null;\n        }, 300);\n\n        // Call onClose callback\n        if (config.onClose) {\n            config.onClose();\n        }\n\n        // Remove escape handler\n        document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleModalEscape);\n\n        currentModal = null;\n    }\n\n    function handleModalEscape(e) {\n        if (e.key === 'Escape' && currentModal) {\n            closeModal();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if a modal is currently open\n     */\n    function isModalOpen() {\n        return currentModal !== null;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Toast Notifications\n    // ============================================\n    const toastContainer = document.getElementById('toast-container');\n\n    if (!toastContainer) {\n        console.error('[Panels] Toast container element not found');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Show a toast notification\n     * @param {string} message - Toast message\n     * @param {Object} options - Toast options (type, duration, icon, etc.)\n     * @returns {Object} Toast control object with dismiss() method\n     */\n    function showToast(message, options) {\n        if (!toastContainer) return null;\n\n        const config = {\n            type: 'info', // 'success', 'info', 'warning', 'error'\n            duration: 5000,\n            icon: null,\n            dismissible: true,\n            ...options\n        };\n\n        const toast = document.createElement('div');\n        toast.className = 'toast toast-' + config.type;\n\n        // Icon\n        let iconHtml = '';\n        if (config.icon) {\n            iconHtml = '<span class=\"toast-icon\">' + config.icon + '</span>';\n        } else {\n            // Default icons by type\n            const defaultIcons = {\n                success: '&#x2713;',\n                info: '&#x2139;',\n                warning: '&#x26A0;',\n                error: '&#x2717;'\n            };\n            iconHtml = '<span class=\"toast-icon\">' + (defaultIcons[config.type] || defaultIcons.info) + '</span>';\n        }\n\n        // Dismiss button\n        let dismissHtml = '';\n        if (config.dismissible) {\n            dismissHtml = '<button class=\"toast-dismiss\" aria-label=\"Dismiss\">&times;</button>';\n        }\n\n        toast.innerHTML = iconHtml + '<span class=\"toast-message\">' + escapeHtml(message) + '</span>' + dismissHtml;\n\n        toastContainer.appendChild(toast);\n\n        // Trigger animation\n        requestAnimationFrame(function() {\n            toast.classList.add('toast-visible');\n        });\n\n        // Auto-dismiss after duration\n        let dismissTimer = null;\n        if (config.duration > 0) {\n            dismissTimer = setTimeout(function() {\n                dismissToast(toast);\n            }, config.duration);\n        }\n\n        // Handle dismiss button\n        const dismissBtn = toast.querySelector('.toast-dismiss');\n        if (dismissBtn) {\n            dismissBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {\n                dismissToast(toast);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Create toast control object\n        const toastControl = {\n            element: toast,\n            dismiss: function() { dismissToast(toast); }\n        };\n\n        return toastControl;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Dismiss a toast notification\n     * @param {HTMLElement} toast - Toast element to dismiss\n     */\n    function dismissToast(toast) {\n        if (!toast || !toast.parentNode) return;\n\n        toast.classList.remove('toast-visible');\n        toast.classList.add('toast-dismissed');\n\n        setTimeout(function() {\n            if (toast.parentNode) {\n                toast.parentNode.removeChild(toast);\n            }\n        }, 300);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Show success toast\n     */\n    function showSuccess(message, options) {\n        return showToast(message, { ...options, type: 'success' });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Show info toast\n     */\n    function showInfo(message, options) {\n        return showToast(message, { ...options, type: 'info' });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Show warning toast\n     */\n    function showWarning(message, options) {\n        return showToast(message, { ...options, type: 'warning' });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Show error toast\n     */\n    function showError(message, options) {\n        return showToast(message, { ...options, type: 'error' });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Utility Functions\n    // ============================================\n    function escapeHtml(text) {\n        if (!text) return '';\n        return String(text)\n            .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n            .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n            .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n            .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')\n            .replace(/'/g, '&#039;');\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Public API\n    // ============================================\n    window.SpaxelPanels = {\n        // Panel registry\n        register: registerPanel,\n        open: openPanel,\n\n        // Direct panel opening\n        openSidebar: openSidebar,\n        closeSidebar: closeSidebar,\n        isSidebarOpen: isSidebarOpen,\n\n        // Modal\n        openModal: openModal,\n        closeModal: closeModal,\n        isModalOpen: isModalOpen,\n\n        // Toasts\n        showToast: showToast,\n        showSuccess: showSuccess,\n        showInfo: showInfo,\n        showWarning: showWarning,\n        showError: showError,\n\n        // Helper to create content element from HTML string\n        createContent: function(html) {\n            const wrapper = document.createElement('div');\n            wrapper.innerHTML = html;\n            return wrapper;\n        }\n    };\n\n Touch Controls for Panel Touch Event Handling\n *\n * Utility for preventing touch events on sidebar panels from propagating\n * to the Three.js canvas and triggering unintended OrbitControls actions.\n *\n * All listeners use passive: true with stopPropagation() to prevent\n * iOS Safari warnings about passive event listeners while still\n * preventing event bubbling to the canvas.\n *\n * OrbitControls Configuration (app.js):\n * - ONE: THREE.TOUCH.ROTATE (one-finger orbit)\n * - TWO: THREE.TOUCH.DOLLY (pinch zoom ONLY, no pan)\n * - THREE: THREE.TOUCH.PAN (three-finger pan)\n * - zoomSpeed: 1.0 (standard touch zoom speed)\n * - Canvas touch-action: none (prevents passive listener warnings)\n *\n * Usage:\n *   Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker(sidebarElement);\n *   Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker(overlayElement);\n *\n * The module also provides direct access to individual event handlers\n * for custom use cases.\n */\n\n(function(window) {\n    'use strict';\n\n    var Controls = {\n        /**\n         * Add touch event stopPropagation listeners to a panel element.\n         * Prevents touchstart/touchmove/touchend from bubbling to the canvas.\n         * @param {HTMLElement} element - A sidebar, overlay, or modal element\n         */\n        addPanelTouchBlocker: function(element) {\n            if (!element) return;\n\n            // Use passive listeners with stopPropagation to avoid iOS warnings\n            // touchstart: Prevents initial touch from reaching canvas\n            element.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n\n            // touchmove: Prevents scrolling/dragging from reaching canvas\n            element.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n\n            // touchend: Prevents tap release from reaching canvas\n            element.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n\n            // touchcancel: Handle system-interrupted touches\n            element.addEventListener('touchcancel', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n            }, { passive: true });\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Remove touch event blockers from an element.\n         * Useful for dynamic panels that are reused.\n         * @param {HTMLElement} element - The element to remove blockers from\n         */\n        removePanelTouchBlocker: (function() {\n            // Store references to handlers to enable removal\n            var handlers = new WeakMap();\n\n            return function(element) {\n                if (!element) return;\n\n                var elementHandlers = handlers.get(element);\n                if (elementHandlers) {\n                    elementHandlers.forEach(function(handler) {\n                        element.removeEventListener(handler.type, handler.fn, handler.options);\n                    });\n                    handlers.delete(element);\n                }\n            };\n        })(),\n\n        /**\n         * Apply touch blocking to all panel elements in the DOM.\n         * Useful for initializing after DOM modifications.\n         * @param {string} selector - CSS selector for panel elements (default: all panel classes)\n         */\n        applyToAllPanels: function(selector) {\n            selector = selector || '.panel-sidebar, .panel-overlay, .panel-modal, .modal-container, .modal-backdrop';\n            var panels = document.querySelectorAll(selector);\n            panels.forEach(function(panel) {\n                Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker(panel);\n            });\n            return panels.length;\n        },\n\n        /**\n         * Check if an element has touch event blockers applied.\n         * @param {HTMLElement} element - The element to check\n         * @returns {boolean} True if blockers are present\n         */\n        hasTouchBlocker: function(element) {\n            if (!element) return false;\n            // Check if element has the data attribute we'll add\n            return element.hasAttribute('data-touch-blocker');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // Add data attribute when blocker is applied (for debugging/inspection)\n    var originalAdd = Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker;\n    Controls.addPanelTouchBlocker = function(element) {\n        if (!element) return;\n        originalAdd.call(this, element);\n        element.setAttribute('data-touch-blocker', 'true');\n    };\n\n    // Auto-apply to existing panels on load (with slight delay for DOM readiness)\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n            setTimeout(function() {\n                Controls.applyToAllPanels();\n                console.log('[Controls] Touch blockers applied to ' + Controls.applyToAllPanels() + ' existing panels');\n            }, 100);\n        });\n    } else {\n        // DOM already ready\n        setTimeout(function() {\n            var count = Controls.applyToAllPanels();\n            console.log('[Controls] Touch blockers applied to ' + count + ' existing panels');\n        }, 100);\n    }\n\n    // Export to window\n    window.Controls = Controls;\n\n    // Also export to Spaxel namespace for consistency with other modules\n    if (!window.Spaxel) {\n        window.Spaxel = {};\n    }\n    window.Spaxel.Controls = Controls;\n\n    console.log('[Controls] Touch controls module initialized');\n})(window);\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":85,"oldLines":7,"newStart":85,"newLines":7,"lines":["          * @param {string} selector -
